name: Bill Olson
subject: Say no to amnesty!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w

Hi Peter,

Amnesty is not a "moderate" position. It is an anti-American position, and we must fight it!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w
!

We can't go back to the bad old days now.

Remember when Obama was letting thousands of illegal immigrants across the porous border every day?

Well Joe Biden wants to return us to Obama-era open borders policies- and that's just not right!

Joe Biden, if elected president, would undo a number of key Trump administration’s policies related to immigration, and specifically illegal immigration, a new report predicts -- concluding that the differences between the two candidates on the issues is “stark.”

“The contrast between President Trump and Biden’s immigration policies is stark,” the report by the conservative Heritage Foundation, obtained by Fox News ahead of its release, says.

“If Biden were to become president, he would return to many of the same immigration policies in place during the Obama administration. This would include protecting and expanding the DACA program, admitting at least 125,000 refugees annually and seeking amnesty for 11 million illegal aliens,” it says.

Understand, I have great respect for those who waited in line and came here legally. My wife fled communist Vietnam after the tragic death of her father under the socialist rule. She immigrated the correct way, she immigrated the legal way.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w

Soto on the other hand is a blindly loyal Democrat partisan. Soto has 95% voting with Pelosi. She says "jump!", and he answers "how high?"

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w

If Soto wins, we get Pelosi.... it's just that simple. If Pelosi is Speaker, we get Obama-era policies on illegal immigration.

If Soto wins... we get open borders!

I need your help urgently. Join my 4,000 patriots who want to drain the Swamp! I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w

Trump is fighting for Florida, just as I'm fighting for my swing district. Helping me helps him- and we need the help right now!

If we win here, Trump will win Florida. This is it!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the Swamp!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w
today? Less than two weeks to go, and we urgently need to stay up on TV in the Orlando area- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hgNGP.7EbF6OuRU&b=N1Duuo5wSfuMIrgTRSj75w
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

body:
You are going to want to watch this before you cast your ballot. Friend -

Sorry to be reaching out to you so late, but this is too important to wait. My team sent an email earlier today and I wanted to make sure you saw it.

Chris Pappas is nothing more than a Swamp politician who thinks it’s okay to use his power in Washington to help lobbyists and then lie about it to the folks he represents back home...

He CLEARLY doesn’t represent our New Hampshire values, so why is HE the one representing us in Congress?

I want to be the kind of leader Granite Staters deserve - someone who does the right thing and fights for working families instead of special interest donors (or significant others).

**If that’s the kind of leader you want in Washington, please consider chipping in to my campaign today:[https://secure.winred.com/mowers-for-congress/direct-1644618/](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=7fcdac82626d483795ca27dce6e678e5&_e=-MgSuGXmZZri1EMqps67ag7j6WpiJxmDiGUONI2rhDMzyeoviTRVIIryN_n3BhnyqPBDv1evURF4wdS1kdy0IG7DkpopYRUv-I73TTOB2vtdcfZTqTptZgSmUFbF7LyPUXjwgCJLfFqc6XukBCVE6RjfcBF66J4RrpwI_j7tCj7gzmvoPn5ZCElvU6nEDfIZ_84gcG6tWu3lam9U_A1H6LpoK19aPtZCleBdL-MQ72X6jWN-79hl-RnUZ5mbyupHB9o5PUIM2d06cdx5uV_0wgAtJ3DJq_K2mqmtiWVNOfHwgC9xJNEByE3Bgx73df-KJGh52U3yhnYCVEpkTnH95Ij_xhImL4g5ug1E9PgMzSbF677fwNiXEkEFZz9co_0wIsSXsSXPCW4e6hL3Xk9IStrYbUi3hqTM6up28K4XDDYDrcC_MLDJ8-33aCM02nTXR5Hy_TJ6_dCQpyCu7mxMAdS4RnB-w_uzgKTHCsOTljtjOVbxspR9qXMkpNy-chpH)**

For the last two years, Chris Pappas has said that he was fighting for our best interests in Washington. But in last night’s debate, Matt dropped a bombshell that proves where Pappas’ priorities REALLY are.

Watch it for yourself:

[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=7fcdac82626d483795ca27dce6e678e5&_e=-MgSuGXmZZri1EMqps67ag7j6WpiJxmDiGUONI2rhDMzyeoviTRVIIryN_n3BhnyqPBDv1evURF4wdS1kdy0IG7DkpopYRUv-I73TTOB2vtdcfZTqTptZgSmUFbF7LyPUXjwgCJLfFqc6XukBCVE6RjfcBF66J4RrpwI_j7tCj7gzmvoPn5ZCElvU6nEDfIZ_84gcG6tWu3lam9U_A1H6LpoK19aPtZCleBdL-MQ72X6jWN-79hl-RnUZ5mbyupHB9o5PUIM2d06cdx5uV_0wgAtJ3DJq_K2mqmtiWVNOfGgLJz3NUK2-hRJcBM9CIxLEvkpFEKolwWgwu45tndKbmZn2WHmwD3N1vndgZMbgVTLycqfeMD2X6KW0wiXPfaEN2NB5CKRTbum3dAlTyqW55S_epAgc9RM1kUVlkYpClOH1QtutmQ6xmdU_zybxawt9UngbHo-v4qStLVYRl5uAkSIp19CHAsOBcB0ucC3serPyJCYS8MW8wKV2E9OUbda)

**That’s right - while Chris Pappas claimed he was fighting for working Granite State families, he was actually voting for legislation while dating a lobbyist...AND LIED ABOUT IT!**

I don’t know about you Matt, but that’s definitely _NOT_ the kind of person I want representing me in Congress. **We’ve got to do whatever it takes to fire Pappas and send Matt to Washington.**

Matt is closing in on Pappas in the polls, and I’m sure last night’s searing debate made the gap even smaller. With a race this tight, every TV ad, bumper sticker, and yard sign matters. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Matt.

**I want to make sure Matt has everything he needs to close the gap and beat Chris Pappas. But unlike Pappas’ wealthy lobbyist friends, I can’t fund this final push alone.**

**[Matt, will you join me in supporting Matt in the final stretch by donating $12 - that’s just $1 a day until the election - right now?](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=7fcdac82626d483795ca27dce6e678e5&_e=-MgSuGXmZZri1EMqps67ag7j6WpiJxmDiGUONI2rhDMzyeoviTRVIIryN_n3BhnyqPBDv1evURF4wdS1kdy0IImUc_nbKUfiCa93RP1R1qwbsrczliS1scUUePwfTyAGUgPlNtugU7SMuSSE_poa6202TvQJlIV003zzPY7AWwhCopLVzQnjSo4AasyLVWvL6kZookrBayZi9obHFbeb5FsJCTASfT63cgrxq4y7oaZjeZdEJ0mtJpjgOuZd7IPheRez8VDWUrx9jzqtwKJ_AA2U5BlgQY4O1FQrtpva0JyBmV3GAR6OBEwplyudTR7X5fIlu5qPwGljsrr5F4ortadkJCxvfUrWHBEDO_9F_cVOUi9egsV-p0VjkrHd4UEiLb5RJtr4PGhcKrnhFDVrHoDzMKA3fACeIG_k-L4lVs_hNtT0Wan9UjHc4XEmid1MfknPWLzqdwl7yHx7CyPFFNU-_F2KjHn6BLzQUZKc7Jyp1_lt4x_cwrmxovCIW-4C)**

clean_body: You are going to want to watch this before you cast your ballot. Friend - Sorry to be reaching out to you so late, but this is too important to wait. My team sent an email earlier today and I wanted to make sure you saw it. Chris Pappas is nothing more than a Swamp politician who thinks it’s okay to use his power in Washington to help lobbyists and then lie about it to the folks he represents back home... He CLEARLY doesn’t represent our New Hampshire values, so why is HE the one representing us in Congress? I want to be the kind of leader Granite Staters deserve - someone who does the right thing and fights for working families instead of special interest donors (or significant others). If that’s the kind of leader you want in Washington, please consider chipping in to my campaign today: Thank you for your continued support of my campaign, friend. \- Matt \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: John at Team Mowers Date: Thurs, Oct 22, 2020 at 3:45 PM Subject: BREAKING: Pappas lies about relationship with lobbyist To: Matt Mowers | | | 🚨 BREAKING 🚨 Chris Pappas passed legislation that benefited big tech while dating an Amazon lobbyist...and then lied about it. Donate now to help kick no-good Chris Pappas out of Congress. | | | | Matt, For the last two years, Chris Pappas has said that he was fighting for our best interests in Washington. But in last night’s debate, Matt dropped a bombshell that proves where Pappas’ priorities REALLY are. Watch it for yourself: | | That’s right - while Chris Pappas claimed he was fighting for working Granite State families, he was actually voting for legislation while dating a lobbyist...AND LIED ABOUT IT! I don’t know about you Matt, but that’s definitely NOT the kind of person I want representing me in Congress. We’ve got to do whatever it takes to fire Pappas and send Matt to Washington. Matt is closing in on Pappas in the polls, and I’m sure last night’s searing debate made the gap even smaller. With a race this tight, every TV ad, bumper sticker, and yard sign matters. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Matt. I want to make sure Matt has everything he needs to close the gap and beat Chris Pappas. But unlike Pappas’ wealthy lobbyist friends, I can’t fund this final push alone. | | Together, we can send a leader with some integrity to Washington. subject: Pat is ready to work around the clock for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Pat has put thousands of hours into this campaign to bring Dignity and Justice for All – and she’s just getting started. | |
---
| | |
---
|
Dear Friend,

Too numerous to count are the nights where you can find Pat late at night in her office working on behalf of her clients, students, or this campaign. If you ask her why, she will tell you it’s her vocation. She feels called to this work of advocacy for others. It was modeled to her by her mom, a federal judge, and her dad, a railroad attorney, who watch over her still. Her parents' deep faith and their belief that you should leave this life a little better because you were in it, live on in Pat.

It’s hard to believe we are less than two weeks away from Election Day. Pat has put thousands of hours into this campaign to bring Dignity and Justice for All – and she’s just getting started. If you’ve considered investing in our campaign or even a further investment in this campaign, _now is the time. _

Please help us elect Pat into office, so she can work around the clock for you.

With deep gratitude,

Rita

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: DNC Presidential Debate Primer [October 22, 2020]...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends-
It’s 12 days until election day, over 47 million ballots have already been cast, and tonight at 9PM ET the final Presidential debate will take place at Belmont University in Nashville, TN. As you watch tonight’s debate please share and amplify content from the[ DNC War Room](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=65958554fd&e=d6c5c7d7ec)’s Presidential Debate Tool Kit (see below) as they will be fact-checking throughout the night. We began our day with Democrats protesting the[ hypocrisy](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=25baae9415&e=d6c5c7d7ec) of the rushed Republican nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court just days 12 before Election Day. Though the vote was 12-0, we are proud of the 10 Democratic senators on the panel who[ boycotted](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8e44720028&e=d6c5c7d7ec) the vote, and filled their seats with pictures of people who rely upon the Affordable Care Act. Because on November 10, the Supreme Court is scheduled to hear arguments over whether the ACA should be tossed out and as of today, Republicans have set up a final vote for Coney Barrett’s confirmation this coming Monday. Voters are continuing to hold Republicans accountable for their actions. It’s further ignited volunteerism from communities like Disabled voters, whose engagement picked up even more as this SCOTUS process moved forward--breaking records in participation in our phone banks and voter protection trainings. So tonight as Joe Biden takes that stage, millions of voters will once again be able to see a calm and steady leader taking on a feckless tyrant. During the debate, Vice President Biden will speak directly to the American people about his plan to contain COVID-19 and to build our country back better. This debate will also discuss Foreign Policy. The DNC War Room released a[ MEMO](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=78df6903b7&e=d6c5c7d7ec) this morning on how Trump’s foreign policy failures have made America less safe. Americans have heard Trump’s unhinged rants, baseless conspiracies, and incessant lying. He still has yet to present any closing argument to convince voters he deserves a second term in office. Meanwhile, we live in a world defined by Trump’s failures to protect the nation.
* More than 8 million Americans have been infected by COVID-19
* 12 million Americans are unemployed
* 1 in 5 small businesses have closed their doors

Voters know Joe Biden — they know his character, his empathy, and his leadership. Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni In this Presidential Debate Primer
* Presidential Debate: How to Watch
* DNC War Room Presidential Debate Tool Kit
* 5 ways you can help fact check and engage voters
* Holding Trump accountable: The Coronavirus; Race; Climate Change; National Security; Leadership
* Biden Harris Platform

**PRESIDENTIAL DEBATE: HOW TO WATCH** The last Presidential debate is scheduled for tonight, Thursday, October 22 at 9PM ET. There are multiple ways to watch on broadcast networks like ABC, NBC, CBS and FOX, as well as major cable news networks like FOX News, MSNBC and CNN. It can also be viewed on C-SPAN and streamed online via YouTube and TV streaming apps. **Location:** Belmont University in Nashville, TN **Time:** 9-10:30 p.m. ET **Moderator:** Kristen Welker, NBC News White House correspondent and co-anchor of “Today Weekend” **Topics announced:** Fighting Covid-19; American families; Race in America; Climate change; National security; Leadership. Each will get 15 minutes. **Note:** The commission recently announced that Biden and Trump would have their microphones muted during portions of the debate. At the start of each of the six segments, each candidate will be given two minutes to answer an initial question, and during that portion, the opposing candidate's microphone will be muted. **DNC WAR ROOM: PRESIDENTIAL DEBATE TOOL KIT** The DNC War Room has compiled this toolkit for allies, partners and surrogates like you. Alongside the Biden campaign, the DNC War Room will fact check Trump’s lies in real time to hold him accountable and get the truth out to reporters, influencers, and the public. **Here are 5 ways that you can help us fact check Trump and engage voters. **
1. **Social Media**
1. Follow the DNC War Room on[ Facebook](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6ee703ca35&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and[ Twitter](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2d48d8963b&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and RT/QT us throughout the debate.
2. Follow and RT/QT the[ @Truth](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fa63b9d171&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Twitter account, a joint effort of the DNC War Room and the Biden campaign.
3. Uplift VP Biden’s record of fighting for everyone to be treated fairly and given the opportunity to succeed.
4. Write from your own perspective! For example, when Trump says he’s done a great job, talk about how his failure to lead on Covid and the economy has impacted your life.
5. Use our hashtags: #Debate2020 #TrumpLied220KDied #HealthCareVoter, #ScrantonvsParkAve.

2. **Support Democrats Up and Down the Ballot**
Encourage your constituents, family members and friends to vote now! Most states have early voting options. Share[ iwillvote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=69838e4cb0&e=d6c5c7d7ec) as a one-stop resource to find your polling place, find voting deadlines, and learn the rules in each state. (Note:[ iwillvote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4ba3226d96&e=d6c5c7d7ec) is the DNC voter resource. If you are a 501(c)(3), you should promote a non-political voter platform.)

3. **Volunteer**
Reaching out to voters is the most important thing we can do now to get out the vote in key battleground states. Sign up at[ joebiden.com/take-action](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a23039e6c4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to text, call, support voter protection efforts, or find events near you.

4. **Message Your Constituents**
After the debate, send an e-blast to your members and constituents with your closing argument about Trump’s record on topics concerning your community. For example:
Subject: Trump has failed American families
This evening during the presidential debate, Trump said ______ about ______. This is false. This is the true record of the Trump administration: [INSERT FACTS FROM BELOW]

We need a president who is committed to healing -not hurting- Americans, and who fights to protect our constitutional rights -- not take them away. Vice President Biden and Senator Harris can lead us out of the mess that Trump has made. Please make a plan to vote right now. Visit[ iwillvote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2cd7feac1c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for information about how to safely vote in your state.

5. Write an Op-Ed
Pen an op-ed in your local paper and make your closing argument about Trump’s failed presidency and why you support Biden and Harris.

**HOLDING TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE** **The Coronavirus**
* 2 million Americans have lost family members as the pandemic has entered a[ third wave](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=cf7cc47dc4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in much of the United States.
* Trump’s attacks on experts and science, along with his chaotic behavior, are making the coronavirus crisis worse. The U.S. surpassed 8.3 million cases and 220,000 deaths.
* Trump is endangering Americans by continuing to lie about COVID-19 while holding potential superspreader events.

* Experts[ agree](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ff8ced9676&e=d6c5c7d7ec) far more tests are needed, with a recent[ report](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c63007085b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) finding the U.S. needs nearly 200 million tests per month to control the pandemic. And Trump still refuses to encourage mask wearing.

* In the middle of a pandemic, Trump is still fighting to tear away protections from as many as 133 million Americans with preexisting conditions — including cancer survivors and many of the 8 million who survived COVID-19.
* Experts say Trump’s executive order won’t actually protect people with preexisting conditions, and is meaningless if his lawsuit succeeds.
* Trump and Pence let PPP funds meant for small businesses go to[ large corporations](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=236b21b6bd&e=d6c5c7d7ec),[ Chinese firms](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0218a6af14&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and companies owned by their[ donors and allies.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8831ef76f7&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

**Race**
* Trump has fanned the flames of hate and division, defended accused murderers, and tried to blame the chaos that ensues on his political opponents.
* Trump refused to condemn[ white supremacist groups](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=41447372c6&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and his supporters who committed[ acts of violence.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f272c6c48d&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Trump’s history of[ racism](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=dac43dc7f6&e=d6c5c7d7ec) dates back at least to the 1970s. And Trump repeatedly[ refused to disavow](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1efaa4f7b6&e=d6c5c7d7ec) David Duke and the KKK.
* Trump’s policies have worsened economic disparities between Black and white Americans.
* [New York Times](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a54fb94b02&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “As a result, the average tax cut going to a white American household is more than double one going to a black or Latino one.”
* [Washington Post](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0a0f42a23d&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “During Obama’s last three years, the black unemployment rate fell from 11.9 percent in December 2013 to 7.9 percent in December 2016.
* Last month the unemployment rate for Black Americans was[ 12.1%](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=19946032a0&e=d6c5c7d7ec), well above the 7% rate for white Americans
* Black-owned businesses were largely shut out of the first round of emergency Paycheck Protection Program loans, with[ only 12%](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=75c272dc8a&e=d6c5c7d7ec) of Black applicants saying they received the amount of loans they requested, and 26% receiving a fraction of what they requested.
* Opportunity zones have been just another[ windfall for rich investors](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7560fcc8db&e=d6c5c7d7ec) like Trump’s friends and family, not the boon to Black communities that Trump claims.

**Climate Change **
* Trump said climate change was a “[hoax](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3d879a3e1f&e=d6c5c7d7ec)” invented by the Chinese.
* Trump has[ dismantled environmental protections](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0efb8adf98&e=d6c5c7d7ec), jeopardizing our air and water quality while driving up[ carbon emissions](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=82397212a4&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* By dismantling clean air and water protections, Trump has done more to[ eliminate environmental protections](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fda5c33c38&e=d6c5c7d7ec) than any other president.
* Trump vacated America’s leadership role in the fight against climate change, creating an[ opening for China to fill the void](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=df0316c28b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and making it harder for other countries to address the issue.
* The U.S. does not have the cleanest air or water in the world, and air pollution actually[ rose in the first two years](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=38d3c8c4e7&e=d6c5c7d7ec) of Trump’s presidency.
* The 2020 Environmental Performance Index ranks the U.S.[ 26th in the world](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6ebeeae968&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for sanitation and drinking water, and[ 16th](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=59255005e0&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for air quality.
* Trump appointees focused their efforts on helping their former employers at the[ expense of the environment](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=28611b7b7a&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

**National Security** The DNC War Room released a[ MEMO](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0cfbd573d7&e=d6c5c7d7ec) this morning on how Trump’s foreign policy failures have made America less safe. Please share the link.
* Because of Trump, we’re a global laughing stock and Americans are less safe today than they were when he took office.
* Iran[ accelerated its nuclear program](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2a6f303f23&e=d6c5c7d7ec) because Trump allowed it.
* North Korea is[ more dangerous than ever](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=25347ba18b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) after continuing to expand its nuclear and missile programs.
* Trump promised to make better deals and end endless wars. And he said he’d make America safer and that we’d be respected again. None of that has happened.
* Instead, America’s global standing has fallen to a record low. Trump has put our national security at risk for his own personal gain.
* He’s cozied up to dictators while alienating our allies. He’s lied about bringing our troops home. He’s brought us to the brink of war and manufactured new crises, including allowing for the[ resurgence of ISIS](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f3b9d2933d&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* More troops say they[ will vote for Biden](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=17155f7717&e=d6c5c7d7ec) than for Trump, and Trump has a history of[ insulting](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=39a98d8305&e=d6c5c7d7ec) our service members.

**Leadership**
* Trump has failed to lead on every front:
* He failed on the coronavirus...[ New York Times](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=18a3540197&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “Inside Trump’s Failure: The Rush to Abandon Leadership Role on the Virus”
* He failed at creating jobs...[ CNN](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=37420b04c5&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “Trump has the worst job losses on record heading into the election”
* He failed to combat climate change....[ Politico](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e1e32e335d&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “Trump's climate change rollbacks to drive up U.S. emissions”
* He failed to make Americans feel safe...[ Quinnipiac poll](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1db27e49bc&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “Fifty percent of likely voters say having Donald Trump as president of the United States makes them feel less safe, while 35 percent say it makes them feel more safe.”
* He failed to denounce QAnon...[Washington Post](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3ca2c70b4d&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “Asked about QAnon, Trump declines to denounce the conspiracy theory”
* He failed to keep his drain the swamp...[ New York Times](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9e90e8c6c7&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “A businessman-president transplanted favor-seeking in Washington to his family’s hotels and resorts — and earned millions as a gatekeeper to his own administration.”

**BIDEN HARRIS PLATFORM**
* For the full Biden-Harris platform, visit[ joebiden.com/joes-vision](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ee446a6dbd&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

###
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8f0c5300f6&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=74ea7de606&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends- It’s 12 days until election day, over 47 million ballots have already been cast, and tonight at 9PM ET the final Presidential debate will take place at Belmont University in Nashville, TN. As you watch tonight’s debate please share and amplify content from the’s Presidential Debate Tool Kit (see below) as they will be fact-checking throughout the night. We began our day with Democrats protesting the of the rushed Republican nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court just days 12 before Election Day. Though the vote was 12-0, we are proud of the 10 Democratic senators on the panel who the vote, and filled their seats with pictures of people who rely upon the Affordable Care Act. Because on November 10, the Supreme Court is scheduled to hear arguments over whether the ACA should be tossed out and as of today, Republicans have set up a final vote for Coney Barrett’s confirmation this coming Monday. Voters are continuing to hold Republicans accountable for their actions. It’s further ignited volunteerism from communities like Disabled voters, whose engagement picked up even more as this SCOTUS process moved forward--breaking records in participation in our phone banks and voter protection trainings. So tonight as Joe Biden takes that stage, millions of voters will once again be able to see a calm and steady leader taking on a feckless tyrant. During the debate, Vice President Biden will speak directly to the American people about his plan to contain COVID-19 and to build our country back better. This debate will also discuss Foreign Policy. The DNC War Room released a this morning on how Trump’s foreign policy failures have made America less safe. Americans have heard Trump’s unhinged rants, baseless conspiracies, and incessant lying. He still has yet to present any closing argument to convince voters he deserves a second term in office. Meanwhile, we live in a world defined by Trump’s failures to protect the nation. More than 8 million Americans have been infected by COVID-19 12 million Americans are unemployed 1 in 5 small businesses have closed their doors Voters know Joe Biden — they know his character, his empathy, and his leadership. Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni In this Presidential Debate Primer Presidential Debate: How to Watch DNC War Room Presidential Debate Tool Kit 5 ways you can help fact check and engage voters Holding Trump accountable: The Coronavirus; Race; Climate Change; National Security; Leadership Biden Harris Platform PRESIDENTIAL DEBATE: HOW TO WATCH The last Presidential debate is scheduled for tonight, Thursday, October 22 at 9PM ET. There are multiple ways to watch on broadcast networks like ABC, NBC, CBS and FOX, as well as major cable news networks like FOX News, MSNBC and CNN. It can also be viewed on C-SPAN and streamed online via YouTube and TV streaming apps. Location: Belmont University in Nashville, TN Time: 9-10:30 p.m. ET Moderator: Kristen Welker, NBC News White House correspondent and co-anchor of “Today Weekend” Topics announced: Fighting Covid-19; American families; Race in America; Climate change; National security; Leadership. Each will get 15 minutes. Note: The commission recently announced that Biden and Trump would have their microphones muted during portions of the debate. At the start of each of the six segments, each candidate will be given two minutes to answer an initial question, and during that portion, the opposing candidate's microphone will be muted. DNC WAR ROOM: PRESIDENTIAL DEBATE TOOL KIT The DNC War Room has compiled this toolkit for allies, partners and surrogates like you. Alongside the Biden campaign, the DNC War Room will fact check Trump’s lies in real time to hold him accountable and get the truth out to reporters, influencers, and the public. Here are 5 ways that you can help us fact check Trump and engage voters. 1. Social Media 1. Follow the DNC War Room on and, and RT/QT us throughout the debate. 2. Follow and RT/QT the Twitter account, a joint effort of the DNC War Room and the Biden campaign. 3. Uplift VP Biden’s record of fighting for everyone to be treated fairly and given the opportunity to succeed. 4. Write from your own perspective! For example, when Trump says he’s done a great job, talk about how his failure to lead on Covid and the economy has impacted your life. 5. Use our hashtags: #Debate2020 #TrumpLied220KDied #HealthCareVoter, #ScrantonvsParkAve. 2. Support Democrats Up and Down the Ballot Encourage your constituents, family members and friends to vote now! Most states have early voting options. Share as a one-stop resource to find your polling place, find voting deadlines, and learn the rules in each state. (Note: is the DNC voter resource. If you are a 501(c)(3), you should promote a non-political voter platform.) 3. Volunteer Reaching out to voters is the most important thing we can do now to get out the vote in key battleground states. Sign up at to text, call, support voter protection efforts, or find events near you. 4. Message Your Constituents After the debate, send an e-blast to your members and constituents with your closing argument about Trump’s record on topics concerning your community. For example: Subject: Trump has failed American families This evening during the presidential debate, Trump said ____ about __. This is false. This is the true record of the Trump administration: [INSERT FACTS FROM BELOW] We need a president who is committed to healing -not hurting- Americans, and who fights to protect our constitutional rights -- not take them away. Vice President Biden and Senator Harris can lead us out of the mess that Trump has made. Please make a plan to vote right now. Visit for information about how to safely vote in your state. 5. Write an Op-Ed Pen an op-ed in your local paper and make your closing argument about Trump’s failed presidency and why you support Biden and Harris. HOLDING TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE The Coronavirus 2 million Americans have lost family members as the pandemic has entered a in much of the United States. Trump’s attacks on experts and science, along with his chaotic behavior, are making the coronavirus crisis worse. The U.S. surpassed 8.3 million cases and 220,000 deaths. Trump is endangering Americans by continuing to lie about COVID-19 while holding potential superspreader events. Experts far more tests are needed, with a recent finding the U.S. needs nearly 200 million tests per month to control the pandemic. And Trump still refuses to encourage mask wearing. In the middle of a pandemic, Trump is still fighting to tear away protections from as many as 133 million Americans with preexisting conditions — including cancer survivors and many of the 8 million who survived COVID-19. Experts say Trump’s executive order won’t actually protect people with preexisting conditions, and is meaningless if his lawsuit succeeds. Trump and Pence let PPP funds meant for small businesses go to, and companies owned by their Race Trump has fanned the flames of hate and division, defended accused murderers, and tried to blame the chaos that ensues on his political opponents. Trump refused to condemn and his supporters who committed Trump’s history of dates back at least to the 1970s. And Trump repeatedly David Duke and the KKK. Trump’s policies have worsened economic disparities between Black and white Americans. : “As a result, the average tax cut going to a white American household is more than double one going to a black or Latino one.” : “During Obama’s last three years, the black unemployment rate fell from 11.9 percent in December 2013 to 7.9 percent in December 2016. Last month the unemployment rate for Black Americans was, well above the 7% rate for white Americans Black-owned businesses were largely shut out of the first round of emergency Paycheck Protection Program loans, with of Black applicants saying they received the amount of loans they requested, and 26% receiving a fraction of what they requested. Opportunity zones have been just another like Trump’s friends and family, not the boon to Black communities that Trump claims. Climate Change Trump said climate change was a “” invented by the Chinese. Trump has, jeopardizing our air and water quality while driving up. By dismantling clean air and water protections, Trump has done more to than any other president. Trump vacated America’s leadership role in the fight against climate change, creating an and making it harder for other countries to address the issue. The U.S. does not have the cleanest air or water in the world, and air pollution actually of Trump’s presidency. The 2020 Environmental Performance Index ranks the U.S. for sanitation and drinking water, and for air quality. Trump appointees focused their efforts on helping their former employers at the. National Security The DNC War Room released a this morning on how Trump’s foreign policy failures have made America less safe. Please share the link. Because of Trump, we’re a global laughing stock and Americans are less safe today than they were when he took office. Iran because Trump allowed it. North Korea is after continuing to expand its nuclear and missile programs. Trump promised to make better deals and end endless wars. And he said he’d make America safer and that we’d be respected again. None of that has happened. Instead, America’s global standing has fallen to a record low. Trump has put our national security at risk for his own personal gain. He’s cozied up to dictators while alienating our allies. He’s lied about bringing our troops home. He’s brought us to the brink of war and manufactured new crises, including allowing for the. More troops say they than for Trump, and Trump has a history of our service members. Leadership Trump has failed to lead on every front: He failed on the coronavirus...: “Inside Trump’s Failure: The Rush to Abandon Leadership Role on the Virus” He failed at creating jobs...: “Trump has the worst job losses on record heading into the election” He failed to combat climate change....: “Trump's climate change rollbacks to drive up U.S. emissions” He failed to make Americans feel safe...: “Fifty percent of likely voters say having Donald Trump as president of the United States makes them feel less safe, while 35 percent say it makes them feel more safe.” He failed to denounce QAnon...: “Asked about QAnon, Trump declines to denounce the conspiracy theory” He failed to keep his drain the swamp...: “A businessman-president transplanted favor-seeking in Washington to his family’s hotels and resorts — and earned millions as a gatekeeper to his own administration.” BIDEN HARRIS PLATFORM For the full Biden-Harris platform, visit. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved. name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: Peter, if I made you proud, I have a favor to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Tonight we are launching our end-of-month goal. |
---
Peter, I just stepped off the debate stage for the last time this election.

After the first presidential debate, it was pretty clear that Donald Trump wouldn't go down without a fight. But tonight, during the last presidential debate of this race, I hope I made you proud by calling out his recklessness, his lies and his failures over the past four years.

I want to let you know that we're seeing record fundraising numbers from folks across the country. It's the best news to receive, I mean it. We built this campaign from the ground up and I can't thank you enough for your support.

But with 12 days left, the worst thing we could do is take anything for granted. We have not won this race yet and anything can happen in the coming days, we learned that four years ago.

[Peter, which is why if you felt like I fought for you and everyone in this nation tonight, I have a favor to ask. Tonight we are launching our end-of-month goal to raise $100 million online between now and midnight on October 31.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_oct2020_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020")

[This is a big goal, I'm going to need your help to get there. Can you chip in $25 or whatever makes sense for your budget? Every dollar truly counts in these last days.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_oct2020_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_oct2020_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020")** It was important to me tonight that I stood up for better health care, for better jobs, and a better future for all of our families. I hope I showed you what real presidential leadership looks like.

We can't afford another four years of Donald Trump -- that's why this battle for the soul of the nation is so important. And it's why we need committed folks like you, Peter, to help us in this final stretch of our campaign.

And with tonight's final presidential debate behind us, we need a surge of donations in these next hours to show the world that we can win this thing.

And we will -- if we stick together.

[This is our last end-of-month goal of the campaign, and raising $100 million more is non-negotiable. So it would really mean a lot to me -- and this whole campaign -- if you could spare a $25 donation before the night ends:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_oct2020_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020")

[https://go.joebiden.com/Final-End-of-Month-Deadline](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_oct2020_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.10.22_B5_jrb-100MM_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-jrb-10222020")

I'm so grateful for what you've done for this campaign, and together we'll bring this thing home.

Joseph R. Biden Jr.

---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1c0/700558915/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1bf/700558915/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1be/700558915/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1bd/700558915/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1bc/700558915/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1bb/700558915/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1be/700558915/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1ba/700558915/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1bd/700558915/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931a9d9/1cd0ac28/11a028a60/3575e1b9/700558915/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
clean_body: Tonight we are launching our end-of-month goal. | Peter, I just stepped off the debate stage for the last time this election. After the first presidential debate, it was pretty clear that Donald Trump wouldn't go down without a fight. But tonight, during the last presidential debate of this race, I hope I made you proud by calling out his recklessness, his lies and his failures over the past four years. I want to let you know that we're seeing record fundraising numbers from folks across the country. It's the best news to receive, I mean it. We built this campaign from the ground up and I can't thank you enough for your support. But with 12 days left, the worst thing we could do is take anything for granted. We have not won this race yet and anything can happen in the coming days, we learned that four years ago. "" "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" It was important to me tonight that I stood up for better health care, for better jobs, and a better future for all of our families. I hope I showed you what real presidential leadership looks like. We can't afford another four years of Donald Trump -- that's why this battle for the soul of the nation is so important. And it's why we need committed folks like you, Peter, to help us in this final stretch of our campaign. And with tonight's final presidential debate behind us, we need a surge of donations in these next hours to show the world that we can win this thing. And we will -- if we stick together. "" "" I'm so grateful for what you've done for this campaign, and together we'll bring this thing home. Joseph R. Biden Jr. | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

subject: Here is What Biden’s Women’s Agenda Will Do For Working Moms
body:
| | | |
---
| [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=da883f715c&e=3f151f8b74)

---
| | |
### Friends,

We have less than 2 weeks until the election and millions of Americans are voting. During tonight's debate, we were presented with two very different visions for our country's future.

It is clear that the crisis we are facing today with our economy, childcare, and a pandemic, we need the leadership of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to lead us out of this mess.

In my [Op-Ed today](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=08ea7ea071&e=3f151f8b74), I wrote about Joe's plan for working moms like me.

I believe that Joe Biden is the advocate single moms like myself and all parents in America need. He has been a single parent in a time of tragedy and unlike the vast majority of our elected officials, understands firsthand the extreme challenges faced by those balancing caregiving responsibilities with work.

But right now, Joe needs you to get him across the finish line. Organizations like Moms in Office have been fighting to elect women up and down the ballot and we are working around the clock to get out the vote.

Can you [chip in today](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=2680facbad&e=3f151f8b74) to help us get through these 12 days?

name: Dean Browning, Chairman
subject: We Must Restore Our Liberty!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CSSPAC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
The very fabric of our society is being torn apart by far Left-Liberal Radicals. Characters such as Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and AOC are more concerned with government control than they are about anything else. We need your support today to fight against these Socialists disguised as Liberals! Will you donate $25, $10, or even just $5 today to continue our fight against their socialist policies that will turn the United States into Venezuela? Slowly but surely, they are tearing apart what it means to be an American Patriot and stripping the American people of their fundamental rights. The record shows itself:
* Weaponizing a pandemic to shut down businesses and schools, destroying the middle class, and instilling fear.
* Supporting the "Green New Deal," which would result in the loss of hundreds of thousands of jobs, crash the economy, and force the U.S. to be dependent on foreign countries for energy.
* Defunding the police and leaving neighborhoods, particularly minority and low-income neighborhoods, to fend for themselves against violent criminals.
* Grant amnesty to all illegal immigrants, including dangerous MS-13 gang members.
* Take away our God-given right to bear arms by promoting gun confiscation.

The list goes on, but without red-blooded patriots like yourself, this nightmare platform will become our reality. CSSPAC is taking the initiative and fighting back!

body:
[Senate Conservatives Fund]

Peter:

There are several new public polls that we wanted to share with
you as we are now just days away from what could be the most
important election in our lifetime.

➤ GEORGIA - Sen. David Perdue (+1)

➤ IOWA - Sen. Joni Ernst (-4)

➤ MICHIGAN - John James (+1)

➤ MONTANA - Sen. Steve Daines (TIED)

THESE RACES ARE VERY COMPETITIVE AND WILL DETERMINE WHETHER CHUCK
SCHUMER AND THE DEMOCRATS TAKE OVER THE SENATE.

PLEASE SUPPORT THESE FOUR CONSERVATIVE SENATE CANDIDATES WITH A
SPLIT DONATION RIGHT NOW.
(HTTPS://SECURE.WINRED.COM/SCF/PRIORITY-CANDIDATES?UTM_SOURCE=REVV&UTM_MEDIUM=EMAIL&UTM_CAMPAIGN=F71A058BA791D85350C98BE9FF159CFF)

No amount is too small.

The Democrats are beating us in candidate fundraising because
they're raising significantly more small-dollar contributions.

But we love our country and we want to keep it great, and I know
we can match the liberals and push our candidates to victory.

THE NOVEMBER ELECTIONS WILL BE DECIDED VERY SOON SO PLEASE DO
WHAT YOU CAN RIGHT NOW.

body:
This election will come down to the very last donation. | [](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=0316a28f1158416a84781e9d66f1864b&_e=bG_eyw35qZeOqOfy4rvIe58Yd2cXdDW0jIp0AmLPHO7n3Y_Ag7m2yyH5NYf6EY7SuqX4FUF-UabmCOnkFxteQa_-8II8eURy1V5uUXIGk9GtY1cfWFpd1cd3dsNmT_Ex_xxz33gpfC3SyYozFwCWxFKM7ejgs6VYNGhCpRjr0mEQUoWxje8k9uzIP8CVt36Bk8NMXLMC0G5PIO06peuB2PC0YW91P1cEMcO6sdmnhDvbeuqo5BWdgrTDcSZJASmJ2sCmX7O8BwEh8Ot-rpJyM1dIxmnpnifhQe52XFOE_BQSydL9dN2WC4HfWEeZfXKYz3V8hVz-Aac6H9cG7EX-s0DCtTDOdRGYz4DAkXPPiJB8Y4EGzTEmcwgR0H-FRAHGbU8Vc-adW-P8E4za9oqLww%3D%3D)

Peter,

Democrats are all-in to defeat us. They are dumping historic amounts of money - HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS - into red states in order to flip the Senate majority. **Wow**.

There’s one thing I know: Senator Steve Daines and I will never stop fighting for you and our conservative values. But here’s the thing - **[we need your URGENT SUPPORT in order to fight the Left’s MASSIVE war chest.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=0316a28f1158416a84781e9d66f1864b&_e=bG_eyw35qZeOqOfy4rvIe58Yd2cXdDW0jIp0AmLPHO7n3Y_Ag7m2yyH5NYf6EY7SuqX4FUF-UabmCOnkFxteQa_-8II8eURy1V5uUXIGk9GtY1cfWFpd1cd3dsNmT_Ex_xxz33gpfC3SyYozFwCWxFKM7ejgs6VYNGhCpRjr0mEQUoWxje8k9uzIP8CVt36B2IpYzRI7YBLd4poT5XSkLnuhfpnSUKMaL_kw5u7TNwzT9BJX0RJNGYyyMzItHp4adY_ou27XCjhE0FmnIza9AHNDh8DV5jUpqiITgYZoHlNmRGK1QSLBkjSwbkpnkCh7DCY_HYnjgfYAsJ6QK1ySXmIZSXHXrhbe2cRFaLLBTUWKYbdsXaSIQCNS4QoTw9uhmWNY-leYy8pKqzYH7qvp4A%3D%3D)**

We’ve reviewed the numbers, and we’re still 234 donations short of hitting our midnight goal. **[Will you contribute $5 or $10 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT in order for us to protect our Republican Senate majority?](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=0316a28f1158416a84781e9d66f1864b&_e=bG_eyw35qZeOqOfy4rvIe58Yd2cXdDW0jIp0AmLPHO7n3Y_Ag7m2yyH5NYf6EY7SuqX4FUF-UabmCOnkFxteQa_-8II8eURy1V5uUXIGk9GtY1cfWFpd1cd3dsNmT_Ex_xxz33gpfC3SyYozFwCWxFKM7ejgs6VYNGhCpRjr0mEQUoWxje8k9uzIP8CVt36BbwZr5GLDnOGvxQrjcPOmBC6L6L5-REyZyG0g__0cJO1L5uyFiLsi3JcA0NqQmaEDDXVwG8XqyKc_CHd0BUwxDTaRE2RpuZZbbD8shd_U38BDxq_jI6eBPDyeLxHiMicoPKgZBkUpjtypbCYacsjedQRzWVlBdoKD3Do6HTsb-nn2mmElDvx24bilh7Wq-MF9Hrz_3Vtdq8_L8WYYG2O78w%3D%3D)**

| [**DEFEND THE MAJORITY ->**](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=0316a28f1158416a84781e9d66f1864b&_e=bG_eyw35qZeOqOfy4rvIe58Yd2cXdDW0jIp0AmLPHO7n3Y_Ag7m2yyH5NYf6EY7SuqX4FUF-UabmCOnkFxteQa_-8II8eURy1V5uUXIGk9GtY1cfWFpd1cd3dsNmT_Ex_xxz33gpfC3SyYozFwCWxFKM7ejgs6VYNGhCpRjr0mEQUoWxje8k9uzIP8CVt36BI6X5L0ia8EDy-C1q7MQlVGUHmbqCFJKIzheWkHthmu-pYzkrv_bFSI8mKpozTH3VD0tRa4N0wLRPBYx5SsNyFLqFZatt0kcqR0-6tAKHEmEZRjluInF_mh5d3XLqRmtioqQA204QKByGliNNT4ODnb0nDsHCe62VgEWhes80W4qVTSIMWonX_F0U0WdasBX1im_0JKQ-WcomZz2XCYORVg%3D%3D)
---

This election will come down to the very last donation because every dollar you contribute will directly impact whether Senator Daines and I can fend off Obama and Schumer’s next multi-million dollar attack against us.

**[We’re counting on your support.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=0316a28f1158416a84781e9d66f1864b&_e=bG_eyw35qZeOqOfy4rvIe58Yd2cXdDW0jIp0AmLPHO7n3Y_Ag7m2yyH5NYf6EY7SuqX4FUF-UabmCOnkFxteQa_-8II8eURy1V5uUXIGk9GtY1cfWFpd1cd3dsNmT_Ex_xxz33gpfC3SyYozFwCWxFKM7ejgs6VYNGhCpRjr0mEQUoWxje8k9uzIP8CVt36BEzu5Q3odB44u8Q3wjPJ3RyG4IXcY1L6qodhAP6ZbYQDsYj9qF4bnGOU5EgQbYM3FvxneN7qQfoRyoVAZyS4nOFx4Wsrwoefe9xCCtndm99O-qupmDCOovU4aXKJeSQBQKs2MI0HB47ltwyJqSaJNNEkY0PPBL2CsSgFlrEgVZyxrX4y_pWDXECUMrE11718BWkZL2l_IrjXXGoYWU7LVGg%3D%3D)**

**[My opponent raised $57 million in the last three months- more than any Senate candidate in history, but I know with your contribution - of even just $5 or $10 - we can BEAT the Left, PROTECT our Senate majority, and SAVE the Supreme Court.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=0316a28f1158416a84781e9d66f1864b&_e=bG_eyw35qZeOqOfy4rvIe58Yd2cXdDW0jIp0AmLPHO7n3Y_Ag7m2yyH5NYf6EY7SuqX4FUF-UabmCOnkFxteQa_-8II8eURy1V5uUXIGk9GtY1cfWFpd1cd3dsNmT_Ex_xxz33gpfC3SyYozFwCWxFKM7ejgs6VYNGhCpRjr0mEQUoWxje8k9uzIP8CVt36BYjziIEoyBWS1L1TGUKd7_TIGHWb7HlsJjQEITT6RN1EL6QXIpfSZY58rd5PX9_yQjQvH83353Q-WoUPu89nBSRTvhHo7t91ygWGLjzzRMbk5IrRNKu0EPsntdGFiP0i_dxoJRz9p_4BxptsDowWl_9TMQfuO1IlivyT7HCI5i1xh70MvR7ETagRagWuvNQk84WgQUW1nRXhxKltjzZXYTA%3D%3D)**

[**PROTECT THE MAJORITY AND SAVE THE SUPREME COURT ->**](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=0316a28f1158416a84781e9d66f1864b&_e=bG_eyw35qZeOqOfy4rvIe58Yd2cXdDW0jIp0AmLPHO7n3Y_Ag7m2yyH5NYf6EY7SuqX4FUF-UabmCOnkFxteQa_-8II8eURy1V5uUXIGk9GtY1cfWFpd1cd3dsNmT_Ex_xxz33gpfC3SyYozFwCWxFKM7ejgs6VYNGhCpRjr0mEQUoWxje8k9uzIP8CVt36BgehSucDXjDXOJnMPmCuDly9nUIiWZ5pjlUJbKxHHfzxUR5EvwT9oSs5T1Ju6PK0ocFntYckmkVpzB3rJBnFHKTn5hWXIdUXv_2H4cQcUL0FwE6YCZM_UNQJIR9z-deKSzSWyteJxC34DlMXoXNnO6gHw8hxHcRmCfazlCRoUmL0_3ihNaXiR_oouoyC1iQ4s8gzyjHvxOuGEi3py-WfY6g%3D%3D)
---

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The contribution you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=0316a28f1158416a84781e9d66f1864b&_e=bG_eyw35qZeOqOfy4rvIe58Yd2cXdDW0jIp0AmLPHO7n3Y_Ag7m2yyH5NYf6EY7SuqX4FUF-UabmCOnkFxteQa_-8II8eURy1V5uUXIGk9GtY1cfWFpd1cd3dsNmT_Ex_xxz33gpfC3SyYozFwCWxFKM7ejgs6VYNGhCpRjr0mEQUoWxje8k9uzIP8CVt36BliErLBsJEHFNxnI--KdwrR37mVXHLJwKfr6zwWVSH3sE7zdphx7jH84Eur00BwNKihagED09V4dUwrpYM0_VGBHNcRqpJTpNcMRDk6Nh6PAx2Mv5jZ2A3SnoXh9dlclceuZ089vJeniZNiytFhivu2kZJUYhfH4Q-pWL1fWREG4k8ozCiDZO24oE4452ePCXipJzDr4ehvNBd0K2z75hQQ%3D%3D) **These races are our only chance at keeping the GOP Senate majority, so thank you for donating before it’s too late.

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=0316a28f1158416a84781e9d66f1864b&_e=bG_eyw35qZeOqOfy4rvIe58Yd2cXdDW0jIp0AmLPHO7n3Y_Ag7m2yyH5NYf6EY7SuqX4FUF-UabmCOnkFxteQa_-8II8eURy1V5uUXIGk9GtY1cfWFpd1cd3dsNmT_Ex_xxz33gpfC3SyYozFwCWxFKM7ejgs6VYNGhCpRjr0mEQUoWxje8k9uzIP8CVt36BupjttppsgH9bsZjlATXvRfZp8kGrDGCi47nogIC_hDeq8RIRAsHWwE-1mOb51GPPGV55qYaqsmMwPYkHadBvrWibYHlRreQEjHKYIbR3Dlo7vxTQIIYu3zEokt5UxblKOets14_obCqyy9CJpCBBP6uK0Bu0biFfqPOvDyES3VxLooUz19Sd8nKPP4J1464uV4xcP4CdvOfXpc2tgSMTzQ%3D%3D)

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72192730626ccbcd23222f89d0d742ccb6e376036a2c4b743540532012f7d0f1b0fa2ef072d07bee3814f9202265f168aafc9072350db643

Friend,

The night of November 3rd is going to be one for the history books. I CAN’T WAIT!

The atmosphere is going to be ELECTRIC when my father wins FOUR MORE YEARS, and what better place to celebrate than in our Nation’s Capital?

name: Team Stanton
subject: Trump's Attacks On Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

I'm not sure if you saw the news, but President Trump has resorted to attacking science and criticizing Dr. Anthony Fauci's reputation as one of the world's leading infectious disease experts. We never imagined we'd have to say this, but now more than ever we need to support leaders who believe in science and who will listen to the experts. The future of our economy, our livelihoods, and the health of our community all depend on cooperating to diminish the threat of this virus so we can all resume our normal lives.

[**We 're only 11 days away from the Election, and every day counts. We're fighting back against the disinformation and setting the record straight. Can we count on you to help Greg finish strong and give us a boost before MIDNIGHT? _DONATE >>_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/69Dor6DuojMD5BGAtVsN0XGXgcJskKwV2h0MA1h7Ia0=/w3mrnkPDL5O6kq2EpHJOlDMGkJQJSF7ONwPELsYlbE8=?refcode=X_101620_DirectAsk_A)

No donation is too small, and every contribution is appreciated. With the help of amazing supporters like you, we can make a difference in November and turn Arizona blue. Thank you for your continued support for Greg!

#
My campaign manager just shared some exciting news with me: **we are just over halfway towards reaching our October goal.**

The bad news, however, is that we are more than halfway through the month of October. That means we need to pick up the pace and raise a lot more money this week.

Your donation will go towards funding our ad campaign, so that we can be on TV as much as possible. It’s crucial that we get our message out to the voters in these final few days as they’re making their final decisions.

I am running on a platform focused on social, political, and economic justice. When I am elected, I will fight for campaign finance reform, taking action on climate change, and equitable COVID-19 relief. **But I can only do that if I win this election.**
** **
[Can I count on you to chip in and help us get back on track?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=3b11957d01&e=140a9b81e7)

---
Now here I am, just days away from becoming the next Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

name: Michael McCaul
subject: FW: AOC is fundraising against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaul for Congress
body:
My opponent will bring her socialism to Texas.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015ED3dLCNJTCm9IcdosyXmCb9nwOvNYNrIOtV5K6jcCiN2PQMRh68dPev0D_Dul0WguTaqb_s5UBVk8MTKE_EVCtMHxIHq4Sp0VP0UKFdPVBHb65rnmr2QzoFIn0W7MQh2s6sdzb51SzugBwYJTwhlI24lHm6tiodM5gCUFoe8LatHJv81LxZebzz5spH8qSleXn4YU8NL7WgXmrpu0aizRoHJq8kAVZdwNZQ28BtySAmKU5EVFcFoYcgFPB11mYZqPnFO0l4kF57_9OXY4vyNoKOGwAAIvcr3WzF6B0kcOCiwCs6FRn644gMx1QCnwBE&c=BVE3BsQypLHgaX7cL-MOKGWFf6NK9FCTF1JW8iYdKrPf59JaIIS9-A==&ch=HeO3CB9LlRJ9FAc1STCgfQUl6fnZ7qsIMxMX9V9q8Pp809yUpfaYwQ==)
---
Friend,
---
After my socialist opponent outraised me during the 3rd FEC quarter, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is taking a victory lap by sending a fundraising email for him.
---
AOC said that my radical opponent has **_" a powerful chance to flip this district."_**
---

**From:** Courage to Change <_[info@ocasiocortez.com](mailto:info@ocasiocortez.com)_ >
**Date:** Wed, Oct 14, 2020 at 10:28 AM
**Subject:** Beth, Mike, and Cori
---
---
Friend,
---
Courage to Change is proud to endorse our latest set of Congressional endorsements: **Beth Doglio (WA-10), Mike Siegel (TX-10), and Cori Bush (MO-01)!**
---
**_In just a moment, we 're going to ask you to split a donation between these three critical progressive allies ahead of their final FEC deadlines at midnight on October 14th._** _But first, we hope you 'll give us a chance to explain why AOC needs them in Congress._
---
_Beth Doglio_ has spent nearly three decades advancing the cause of environmental justice. Together with activists across the state, Beth helped build the Washington Conservation Voters - which grew to one of the strongest environmental advocacy organizations in the state. Her campaign centers on the Green New Deal, and fully commits to the ideal of combating our climate crisis with solutions that rise to the scale of the crisis.
---
_Mike Siegel_ is endorsed by Bernie Sanders, and spent nearly 20 years in public service as a teacher and civil rights lawyer. He's fighting for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and stronger labor protections. Mike has a powerful chance to flip this district amidst record high voter registration in Texas - **and just yesterday, a new poll was released with Mike just 1 point behind his Republican opponent.** _With your help, he can win._
---
_Cori Bush_ has been organizing on the ground for years. Her campaign is a true movement - built through powerful relationships between folks who have been suffering under racial, economic, social, or environmental injustice. After an incredible people-powered upset against an establishment dynasty in her primary, she's facing a set of right-wing challengers who oppose every one of our progressive ideals in the general.
---
Here's the reality that we face: If we're going to center the struggles of working people, we need folks who are willing to stand up for the solutions that rise to the scale of our challenges in the halls of power. **Cori, Mike, and Beth are exactly those champions.**
---
**_They need your support now. All of these campaigns are running important get-out-the-vote programs to mobilize supporters, persuade undecided voters, and maximize the chance of victory on November 3rd. Will you rush a split contribution to support them?_**
---
---
Thanks for your time,
---
Courage to Change
---
815 A Brazos Street, PMB 230, Austin, Texas 78701
---
Paid for by McCaul for Congress
---

Will you commit to Dignity and Justice for All? | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=7e101e952c&e=5886ca081d)

|
Dear Friend,

Early voting is in full swing, and the time to commit to vote for dignity and justice for all is now.

When you commit to vote for Pat Hackett this election, you are committing to restore the House of Representatives to the People’s House. You are committing to bring the voices of IN-02 to Washington. You are committing to Dignity and Justice for All.

---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c8a8e8e4ac&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
---
| Show Jackie Walorski and other Trump loyalists that we cannot be silenced. Pledge your vote today for Pat Hackett for Congress.

When you commit to vote for Pat, you will receive a pledge badge to post on social media! Please share it far and wide so others will see your commitment to Dignity and Justice for All.

**In these final two weeks, we are depending on your help to spread Pat’s message.

Please consider another investment here to keep Pat’s ads running on TV: **

---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=bd7fa73177&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
We will not be silenced. We will vote, and we will pledge to work to make sure our family and friends go vote.

Early voting is in full swing and the deadline to request an absentee ballot is October 22 — just three short days from now. The time to commit to vote for Pat Hackett is now.

When you commit to vote for Pat Hackett this election, you are committing to restore the House of Representatives to the People’s House. You are committing to bring the voices of IN-02 to Washington. You are committing to Dignity and Justice for All.

Show Jackie Walorski and other Trump loyalists that we cannot be silenced. Pledge your vote today for Pat Hackett for Congress.

With deep gratitude,

Team Hackett

~1.1 million voters still have no idea about it.
| Friend,
---
Tucker Carlson's show featured a segment on Democrat Cal Cunningham who is being investigated by the U.S. Army Reserve for having an affair with another soldier's wife.
---
__But while patriots like Tucker are exposing the truth about Cunningham, Schumer is spending $80 MILLION to try and BURY it.__
---
So, we produced an ad to cut through Schumer's ads and get the truth out to voters, because this Senate race *will decide* the fate of President Trump's Senate majority.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: You're Invited: Join Wesley For A Non-Partisan Candidate Forum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
You're Invited: Join Wesley Hunt For A Non-Partisan Candidate Forum
This evening, Wesley Hunt, Republican candidate for Texas' 7th Congressional
District, will participate in a non-partisan candidate forum hosted by the six
Mayors of the Memorial Villages. Initially designed to be an open, non-partisan
debate for Hunt and his opponent, Representative Lizzie Fletcher, tonight's
forum will now feature a question-and-answer session with candidate Wesley
Hunt, as Fletcher refuses to attend.

The Mayors of the Memorial Villages organized this event to give voters
access to open, transparent dialogue between the candidates. In Fletcher's
absence, their goal remains the same: provide an objective, candid forum in
which voters' questions are answered.

Unfortunately, this event marks the fourth debate invitation snubbed by
Representative Fletcher in the past two months. And while Fletcher, determined
to obscure her liberal voting record, continues to dodge these open debates,
Hunt is enthusiastic to participate in what he believes is an integral element
of our democratic system.

"Debates are a fixture in our democracy, and I take very seriously my
responsibility to openly respond to questions from voters in the 7th District,"
said Hunt. "Of course it is disappointing to see my opponent repeatedly refuse
to engage in this process, but it's what we've come to expect from someone who
votes with Pelosi over 99% of the time. Rather than focus on this dereliction
of duty on the part of my opponent, this evening I look forward to bringing
this race back to the people of the 7th District. At the end of the day, this
election is about the voters: their businesses, their families, and their
future. I am looking forward to answering their questions and to furthering the
dialogue necessary to advance the 7th District beyond the challenges we face
today. Thank you to our hosts and everyone who has worked to make this
important event possible."

Details for the event:
Where: The Pavilion at Spring Valley Village City Park When: 6:30pm,
Friday, October 23rd
Hosts: The Mayors of the Memorial Villages
We hope you will join Team Hunt and residents throughout the 7th District for
this open, non-partisan discussion.
###

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=424a4d849f794c8bae372e30d9dc1b8c&_t=Nl76kwyKZFK-vE5AGrLVSSkqkugWfi-7I1mrAgAi5Hcl9geKzXmQlArbrxN8eefxTOXuD44-KCsWqvU6jVqy_MKhReCcJ3TBAxuWX_27Q26-doMyHEj1DcYxew5297xBqK9bK0qW7D6wPmnkzGTNJ--zupdunDWcJ7V418izuCU%3D>
.

clean_body: This is an urgent update: House Majority PAC -- Nancy Pelosi's PAC -- is now spending $5,700,000.00 to attack us. . == This is an urgent update, Friend: House Majority PAC -- Nancy Pelosi 's PAC \-- is now spending $5,700,000.00 to attack us. That 's on top of the millions our opponent has in his pocket. That's on top of the onslaught of dark money. More is being spent against us than any other race in the country. That's on top of the up to $60,000,000.00 Bloomberg has pledged to spend against conservatives in must-win, toss-up races like ours. To put it bluntly: we're being slaughtered. On-air, online, in your mailbox, on the streets, everywhere you turn we are being outspent and attacked. BUT despite the Far Left 's best efforts, this race is STILL a TOSS-UP and Inside Elections is calling it the seat most likely to flip in all of Orange County. That 's why, today, we need your help. == Pelosi seems to believe this seat is for sale, but she clearly underestimates the power of our grassroots. If every person who read this email chipped in even just $1 we'd leave her handpicked candidate in the dust. | ==** == == == == == == == == == But if we fail to act, we'll lose everything. This seat was only recently flipped blue -- for the first time EVER \-- in 2018 and this is our last chance to flip it RED before it's gone for good. Only 11 days left. == Matt Ciepielowski Campaign Manager Team Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. ==** Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress 8907 Warner Ave Suite 222 Huntington Beach, CA 92647 == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Stop the Green Wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative: By now, you've heard about the "blue wave" of Democrats that could win this year, but what's powering their campaigns is a **"green wave"** of small-dollar donations. In fact, Democrat candidates are massively out-raising GOP candidates with eye-popping numbers that are up to ten times the amount raised by candidates during this time in the 2018 elections. Our candidates are actually facing a "green tsunami" this year. How is this possible? For more than a decade, the Democrats have been building a **grassroots fundraising base** to fund their candidates. They've done it using a centralized fundraising clearinghouse called ActBlue to process low-dollar contributions for their campaigns. **Rather than only donating to local candidates, the Democrats are giving to candidates thousands of miles away.** This has helped liberals raise unimaginable sums that could keep Nancy Pelosi the Speaker of the House for years to come. **[We need to use the same national model to fight back!](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=3a66b2ff5d5d40ecb48997ab286f4695&_e=4WO2rwMDYiXfKTfDjC1FKlTWPQ34nwjrEZI3fYINkG2P8k8pOvpU2Hv-1dbhUtnNLUYLMrCOOWCMt1vUugRRU92tLq0oBjI1JtO3JDq1ZiR-QNO4ITThs-IbpXKfkLFuSxNohPj7n39yYkydZ0WBJzKpDsc15pp0swTavyCM0_CNCJj91TIRNFoRcguJAxM-6UOZnFQ9Z0SP_Cqn9xfrMdn6vdCSNeZ1h6onQZf9ks-KHUsJ8zB_ZGgeLvmPlkgHbQ4ryUdpmgPLbgFKUM-Wcd9Rtj_N54RAkuDeBhg8L8qVTkkAwqkiNeDhjgPegYyLwseAaYVtGdvaZnTzqpx1KxSZ6i6f9v1b6CNfAoLvv1q8grl64JFy8uA6-hWttOkZoGtFeBL5ImNviYED2MvvzuiwtDyFTWSrMjR00FgbBhA%3D)** U.S. House races are federal elections that impact all Americans so it doesn't matter where you live – we all have an interest in helping the best candidates compete and win. **We need to work together to make sure the right candidates get the support they need to get their message out.** That's why I support the House Freedom Fund, which gives conservatives across country an easy way to donate directly to multiple candidates for the U.S. House. **[Please fight back against the "green tsunami" by making a split contribution to these priority candidates:](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=3a66b2ff5d5d40ecb48997ab286f4695&_e=4WO2rwMDYiXfKTfDjC1FKlTWPQ34nwjrEZI3fYINkG2P8k8pOvpU2Hv-1dbhUtnNLUYLMrCOOWCMt1vUugRRU92tLq0oBjI1JtO3JDq1ZiR-QNO4ITThs-IbpXKfkLFuSxNohPj7n39yYkydZ0WBJzKpDsc15pp0swTavyCM0_CNCJj91TIRNFoRcguJAxM-m4ci6WH23MmHqaa1dkZ2ymOkVa4mxMhxQCFXgLIkGZf11rkDM1Z4DtVLy5wNJtbkcmw-OvBIAyLaQF352fJ1vk9Dcdx9pOFHYSJ9t6ce7xFCVc1fwoBAdHdjbLf2Whc2l0qZyBWbqFOPPaCNxwPRcUGtXZKMdekgFdup0bgkN0cZ3M4kPXSYTneDdoEziD69rfiLWa2ryNO6s5AOz6hUDdY-B1hXM6C_5s2uB2aQs-E%3D)** clean_body: Fellow Conservative: By now, you've heard about the "blue wave" of Democrats that could win this year, but what's powering their campaigns is a "green wave" of small-dollar donations. In fact, Democrat candidates are massively out-raising GOP candidates with eye-popping numbers that are up to ten times the amount raised by candidates during this time in the 2018 elections. Our candidates are actually facing a "green tsunami" this year. How is this possible? For more than a decade, the Democrats have been building a grassroots fundraising base to fund their candidates. They've done it using a centralized fundraising clearinghouse called ActBlue to process low-dollar contributions for their campaigns. Rather than only donating to local candidates, the Democrats are giving to candidates thousands of miles away. This has helped liberals raise unimaginable sums that could keep Nancy Pelosi the Speaker of the House for years to come. U.S. House races are federal elections that impact all Americans so it doesn't matter where you live – we all have an interest in helping the best candidates compete and win. We need to work together to make sure the right candidates get the support they need to get their message out. That's why I support the House Freedom Fund, which gives conservatives across country an easy way to donate directly to multiple candidates for the U.S. House. ✅ Lauren Boebert (CO-03) ✅ Nick Freitas (VA-07) ✅ Christina Hagan (OH-13) ✅ Yvette Herrell (NM-02) ✅ Jeanne Ives (IL-06) ✅ Jim Marchant (NV-04) ✅ Rich McCormick (GA-07) ✅ Matt Mowers (NH-01) ✅ Jim Oberweis (IL-14) ✅ Burgess Owens (UT-04) ✅ Scott Perry (PA-10) ✅ Greg Raths (CA-45) ✅ Matt Rosendale (MT-AL) ✅ Chip Roy (TX-21) You can support all of these candidates with one transaction, and 100% of your candidate contributions go directly to their campaigns. Democrats understand what's at stake and they're working together to support their candidates in battleground races. We need to do the same, and we need to do it now. body:
Have you seen the latest poll? It has us in the lead 45% to 44% against our self-funded, mega-millionaire opponent... but victory is within the margin of error.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x08bR2QANWe2EdWd5m-17XiWEZsG_vXLsRvA6gVrBUjwz5Sc11q85RnKE88JjJgGCXaTEDZHBgselnLIvbDXw2Xjj-T8fQmWIBQZsE_IQ8I2en6bnoYbNsPlXSe8YUp3_TJjdM19XPwUExiBpiSy0eZvOpSAwAh1qgX2yiJIHgHQs0_0XjgdrcxNkx5jXVLG-nHSqANGr1UIdO4MgQ_-bz2f_IQ9H5Jj_XN0Dby7bUQ94ZgyJg3duVl-jpGAtDnst9KTgKL7Jr_cquC58ia8L11GdRV8tM1jwKpcfYh68ld0yoacHOOYEa9MJCFSf6HvJ3XCG_hbbvB6qJYfSgNbKPOU3fY8PE9DO84MqAz88b8-ozd1spVR14X-_9SbeL_Il9AljMIc3vdnkaRl0Jz2HAo4g9KQty7oIIlVKaThHkI_vSMakL9aeovYweF7fJytkEsGPE_guhwZ5QwPP4y97P3F5Q12rnHN&c=VJAV9MpE54c8hMMH4jq8INrljQwXfEsmZbT1ppGcuM3ACyEOLXmMiQ==&ch=p9eSxMjfUCMTIW5u2gNqxTpwQT4aOM__8mCzVZ55CEYulL_uBRgLKg==)
