name: Jim Jordan
subject: I need your endorsement before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Please consider endorsing me for re-election before it's too late. It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=a1ec930d23c54298bce4ba7197e2b33d&_e=K4WUakx1ZAncapZlgzWPvfoM5m7ggPEjG1Hm8rvrv59fqP1jzyGusDIWKcs7BitZ7X4SqZ3E8IqBhL111x4VmcHH3Js5CTbcSqS9O9t2KovghRYWGdapw0kxvdAjq6wdluvWxd_sRE2tJw3KifT_gPf1WjWx4tRzFSMiJxypuOAV3e_jtfYMWsOCqGEalraWeA6m7GImeEfafAN7WvYv_JoimLJC2Zr1ERGE1DzTSTbTUkdF8USLfEiziYUIE-RXE9afBJwUNDPTN9lR3gLZmcDcuQuo_A3jLG3B_lGbBXmG0CBbPBC-xGu0MNbKMB45-slCoOpk4CnnlJqjg-RmQBSNbcjJHytbt0_kiBGI2m5qEjwqJILI-tCRP5TIjpumTdy9A8HcJw0KHzYzRtV_osBBilnwGY4QJTjeKUnOQrpG8YufU2Vuaa7k48ezrKUzm-o1GUTeARvK3Ma9rdXeL9Ieo3iYxyR30-Ys_On0JPY%3D)
---

Peter,

We’re getting down to the wire. Election Day is right around the corner, and it has become increasingly clear that there are two very different visions for our country being debated.

One vision which consists of:
* Limited government and support for individual liberty
* A pro-growth, deregulatory agenda
* Keeping the American economy OPEN

And Joe Biden's vision which consists of:
* Raising taxes
* Defunding the police
* Holding our economy hostage

We’ll continue doing our part to fight back against the radical left and help put President Trump over the finish line, but our fighting comes at a cost and we need to know that you will have our back. **[That’s why today I’m asking you to re-affirm your endorsement of my campaign](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=a1ec930d23c54298bce4ba7197e2b33d&_e=K4WUakx1ZAncapZlgzWPvfoM5m7ggPEjG1Hm8rvrv59fqP1jzyGusDIWKcs7BitZ7X4SqZ3E8IqBhL111x4VmcHH3Js5CTbcSqS9O9t2KovghRYWGdapw0kxvdAjq6wdluvWxd_sRE2tJw3KifT_gPf1WjWx4tRzFSMiJxypuOAV3e_jtfYMWsOCqGEalraWeA6m7GImeEfafAN7WvYv_JoimLJC2Zr1ERGE1DzTSTbTUkdF8USLfEiziYUIE-RXE9afBJwUNDPTN9lR3gLZmfbeSqWbNslTiRbfLQ1mzShr0ru60pxofTCZGcePCfUNRxCvDNTPk6vnS620i8oqz53KEgFbnLI5Gb-f25DjrENE2FGngga-5eK0gMHirhZOaulrJsfbcjFASFd7kSjWCWNBnkSY-uv_pnqEvLxE9QIJ3I2hR3s0Ppsn5VhrM0O7rsw627kJZhxpBz-NKWFkfbQGpkPJiNgSHKooIbzsSAw%3D)**.

Since we first asked for your endorsement in April, more than 100,000 conservatives have personally endorsed me for re-election. **[Now, with 11 days until the end of this election cycle, we’re setting a goal to grow the number of endorsements to 150,000.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=a1ec930d23c54298bce4ba7197e2b33d&_e=K4WUakx1ZAncapZlgzWPvfoM5m7ggPEjG1Hm8rvrv59fqP1jzyGusDIWKcs7BitZ7X4SqZ3E8IqBhL111x4VmcHH3Js5CTbcSqS9O9t2KovghRYWGdapw0kxvdAjq6wdluvWxd_sRE2tJw3KifT_gPf1WjWx4tRzFSMiJxypuOAV3e_jtfYMWsOCqGEalraWeA6m7GImeEfafAN7WvYv_JoimLJC2Zr1ERGE1DzTSTbTUkdF8USLfEiziYUIE-RXE9afBJwUNDPTN9lR3gLZmbp3lYXplbY3QymorpqqSKob_ImpEhXIY6A_aO2VMpqazahr2_LCqH1PytYKDrEsAyboNC1UKzFMh8JMs5p1I_Fb-v37Of0WO7J8UpDrj371h5jfZAn2BND-HrLVlqPKuYX6ZZsXB58mQVpMf3j3YrAKC4gGI8PZ8oRNVQwdpFGdoQoIVW60mDM_eRSC5wAmRCll_Oek2zhJtkJwt-7Dyt8%3D)**

[](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=a1ec930d23c54298bce4ba7197e2b33d&_e=K4WUakx1ZAncapZlgzWPvfoM5m7ggPEjG1Hm8rvrv59fqP1jzyGusDIWKcs7BitZ7X4SqZ3E8IqBhL111x4VmcHH3Js5CTbcSqS9O9t2KovghRYWGdapw0kxvdAjq6wdluvWxd_sRE2tJw3KifT_gPf1WjWx4tRzFSMiJxypuOAV3e_jtfYMWsOCqGEalraWeA6m7GImeEfafAN7WvYv_JoimLJC2Zr1ERGE1DzTSTbTUkdF8USLfEiziYUIE-RXE9afBJwUNDPTN9lR3gLZmZTGW8YlHgwMEdP9U_HQO6XV80u7-832YcDoURmRGkbfMrNBOZrp7r1ZveG8kX7VRDPfoybDyFrSnhOBxt0Cs-NaScDCVNSmBl_PrBFe3MjRDJMBHVpWFRq7dETzuKl7Z9lbhGHOAILIvki1b0fnjiELH_kb4bEcsBSv76ZGL6LPrsxvgP7m9Xl31tGKgKcJZ3ZzQHtCEuhtJjyr_IfYQmA%3D)

As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me. They simply cannot stand how we’re helping the American public come to the realization that **[Democrat leaders in the House are more focused on tearing apart the Republican Party than delivering for the American people.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=a1ec930d23c54298bce4ba7197e2b33d&_e=K4WUakx1ZAncapZlgzWPvfoM5m7ggPEjG1Hm8rvrv59fqP1jzyGusDIWKcs7BitZ7X4SqZ3E8IqBhL111x4VmcHH3Js5CTbcSqS9O9t2KovghRYWGdapw0kxvdAjq6wdluvWxd_sRE2tJw3KifT_gPf1WjWx4tRzFSMiJxypuOAV3e_jtfYMWsOCqGEalraWeA6m7GImeEfafAN7WvYv_JoimLJC2Zr1ERGE1DzTSTbTUkdF8USLfEiziYUIE-RXE9afBJwUNDPTN9lR3gLZmUAjAaaT_8RMnu9j3CprURG7iTMoCeduSSJm-F8UyFH-ACwGocvYc-THYdQkGA-YGbM9wrrTi7Du9C_5G1sYKg5NcwNKOu1BwkwdpfXB4wefJJ6qjHsNbHEWk9Hn4UTssvpyrf7UcXbGBTLtCQ8S5ZSocxw_PPpQFEADMptwRS300YsFhMsrpSGCVcZvSzMi0qa_aFr5_gt1o-9Ji2XiLII%3D)**

If you agree with me that:

* We need to keep the American economy OPEN
* Do everything we can to keep socialist sympathizers out of power
* Stop the left’s campaign of “cancel culture”

**[Then please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=a1ec930d23c54298bce4ba7197e2b33d&_e=K4WUakx1ZAncapZlgzWPvfoM5m7ggPEjG1Hm8rvrv59fqP1jzyGusDIWKcs7BitZ7X4SqZ3E8IqBhL111x4VmcHH3Js5CTbcSqS9O9t2KovghRYWGdapw0kxvdAjq6wdluvWxd_sRE2tJw3KifT_gPf1WjWx4tRzFSMiJxypuOAV3e_jtfYMWsOCqGEalraWeA6m7GImeEfafAN7WvYv_JoimLJC2Zr1ERGE1DzTSTbTUkdF8USLfEiziYUIE-RXE9afBJwUNDPTN9lR3gLZmRDVj-8GxTJg15bpzvvXlVc96LpRC1xsQzR-aMLn3nEmbJzMSxhH1prt5xmVXXa1pjLgsO4seasdJVfPyHLvCjJbYylxismYDtsgJ9TX-fYU9WyvGi15-qTH6xrsWR4Emv6rjhlvBE8-d8uz0G6NHNquqs4R4SPhEL0wivjQvWajqVl9UKZMbw3IFMRR5ERmff0JrX0pKE7iDu85GmMiyv4%3D)**

**Your endorsement** will serve our team well as I continue to fight for an America FIRST agenda in the House.

For liberty,
Jim Jordan

[](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=a1ec930d23c54298bce4ba7197e2b33d&_e=K4WUakx1ZAncapZlgzWPvfoM5m7ggPEjG1Hm8rvrv59fqP1jzyGusDIWKcs7BitZ7X4SqZ3E8IqBhL111x4VmcHH3Js5CTbcSqS9O9t2KovghRYWGdapw0kxvdAjq6wdluvWxd_sRE2tJw3KifT_gPf1WjWx4tRzFSMiJxypuOAV3e_jtfYMWsOCqGEalraWeA6m7GImeEfafAN7WvYv_JoimLJC2Zr1ERGE1DzTSTbTUkdF8USLfEiziYUIE-RXE9afBJwUNDPTN9lR3gLZmdqKdDQ89IYTCl2_98KP5Vwe5HQ5rC1P7saSTAP8csyUv6jvTxUh_3oyNtynbvdROMRqIYnrPB1vhkYISEIb5POH2GHkguUnlpb_acPsw62twcIFdz3kYkm2KrQZlH5vgueHPvrTtQAQwbt1Y1axDtQp2lbWAxebOGgPlDKGJzMafbES7Xek3bn69lmoo3wiFr8cEWHAc4fyIUyHprbBUk8%3D)

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: 11 Days
body:
Peter,
Last night, in the race for the White House, we saw two candidates with very different visions.
Earlier in the day, in the race for the U.S. Senate, one party advanced the nomination of Amy Coney Barrett while the other party boycotted the vote and is threatening to pack the Court.
In total, the White House and Senate races add up to 36 races.
They are incredibly important, but they are just a fraction of the 100,000 elections on November 3.
We are in the final days, and how we perform will decide whether or not Christian voters are a factor.
**[Our goal of $250,000 has not yet been met, and we need your help to get there before we run out of time.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201023apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201023apl01nd&n=1)**
**[I ask you now, please chip in with whatever you can.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201023apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201023apl01nd&n=2)**
We have 11 days, and we don’t get a do-over.
Thank you for your generosity and commitment to stand for biblical values; we are almost there.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201023apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201023apl01nd&n=3)
Sincerely,
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201023apl01nd&n=4)

name: Mark Warner
subject: Back in high school
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
... I didn't know I wanted to be a Senator. I knew I wanted to make a difference.
|
---

| | Derek --

I've been going through some old pictures as we put together ads for this campaign, and I came across this one of me as a senior in high school. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da04/53d9897e/55431cab/1c88fdc4/1000993114/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-difference?refcode=20201023_f_1_nd__894__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
Looking back, I guess I had that red, white, and blue thing going on even back then. But in high school, I didn't know that I wanted to be your Senator -- I just knew that I wanted to get stuff done and to make a difference.

My parents weren't political -- but they were involved in our community, and they raised me to be the same way. It was less about the red team versus the blue team, and more about how we could all work toward the common good. I've tried to carry that lesson with me throughout my political career, working across the aisle to come to solutions that move us all forward.

**[If you believe, as I do, that we've got to get back to working together so that everyone has a fair shot at success, will you consider chipping in to help send me back to the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da04/53d9897e/55431cab/1c88fdc3/1000993114/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-difference?refcode=20201023_f_1_nd__894__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

We're in the home stretch, and every little bit does make a difference. I appreciate your support, and I look forward to continuing to work together. The best days for Virginia -- and for our country -- lie ahead of us.

Thank you,
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da04/53d9897e/55431cab/1c88fdc2/1000993114/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-difference?refcode=20201023_f_1_nd__894__&refcode2=graphic2&amount=5")
---
Mark Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da04/53d9897e/55431cab/1c88fdc1/1000993114/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-difference?refcode=20201023_f_1_nd__894__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/76523/images/FinelloForCongress_PrimaryLogo%20%281%29.png]
Hi Peter, There are only 11 days left until the most important election of our lifetime! Ballots are being mailed out across the District and we know Christina has what it takes to flip the district blue and be the first Congresswoman from PA-01 in history. We can't do this alone, so join us to Get Out The Vote in PA-01 over these next two weeks! [http://www.finello.vote/gotv] This weekend (10/24 & 10/25) is our Get Out the Vote weekend where we will be talking to thousands of voters and making plans to vote! Get Out The Vote is now more important than ever - We need you to signup for at least 4 volunteer shifts to make sure that every elgible voter in PA-01 gets to the polls or returns their mail in ballot! [http://www.finello.vote/gotv] www.finello.vote/gotv [www.finello.vote/gotv] Join Christina and Team Finello, Get Involved, And Speak To Community Members During GOTV About Why We Need To Flip PA-01 Blue! [https://www.finello.vote/gotv] This our last chance to make sure Christina Finello is the next Representative from PA-01. Team Finello will provide comprehensive trainings before each of the shifts to ensure that everybody who joins us is comfortable, excited, and more than ready to speak with community members in PA-01.Momentum & excitement is building in the District! With your help, we will elect Christina as the first woman to represent PA-01 in Congress & flip PA-01 Blue!
Best, Team Finello

name: GeorgiaBlueProject.com
subject: Last night was all we needed to see.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/20692304/257987290/426942739?refcode=em10232020-PM-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhYjNlNGY4LTc4MTUtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9ZFYO8qEyozahLTBHxl5LJVjFVqClBMgVfFIKSC8KDw=) Team, If the picture wasn't clear before, last night made it crystal. In a much more civil atmosphere, we witnessed two candidates go on stage to make their case to the American people, and only one left deserving of the presidency. Joe Biden called for empathy, pandemic relief, racial and social justice, an end to the child separations at the border, a decisive move toward a cleaner environment and renewable energy, and unity for a country so clearly divided. Donald Trump tried to sling dirt at Joe's family. He called himself the least racist person in the room with a Black journalist moderating the debate. **He tried to justify 545 children being permanently separated from their parents, saying that _"they came without parents" _and _"the coyotes separated them" _and that they are _"so well taken care of."_** [**_We are sick of this American nightmare inflicted on us by the worst president in history. If we flip Georgia blue, it guarantees a loss for Trump and the start of the healing process for our nation. Can you give _**_**$26 right now so that we can put more money behind our digital ads and reach more Georgia voters before the end of early clean_body: = Team, If the picture wasn't clear before, last night made it crystal. In a much more civil atmosphere, we witnessed two candidates go on stage to make their case to the American people, and only one left deserving of the presidency. Joe Biden called for empathy, pandemic relief, racial and social justice, an end to the child separations at the border, a decisive move toward a cleaner environment and renewable energy, and unity for a country so clearly divided. Donald Trump tried to sling dirt at Joe's family. He called himself the least racist person in the room with a Black journalist moderating the debate. He tried to justify 545 children being permanently separated from their parents, saying that "they came without parents" and "the coyotes separated them" and that they are "so well taken care of." = If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = We are so close to the end of a dark stain on American history. name: Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy
subject: Take BACK the House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Friend,

You hear every election that this is the election of a lifetime, but this time we all know it’s true. In less than two weeks, we’ll decide the future of our country and either Keep America Great or send us down a path of liberal destruction the likes of which we’ve never seen.
**It’s imperative we take back control of the US House** to save our country from the radical socialists who want to eliminate millions of oil & gas jobs, eliminate your private health insurance, and raise your taxes.
**Troy Nehls is just the man** to do it in Texas’ 22nd Congressional District. _He’s a US Army veteran and law and order Sheriff who’s strong on the military, the border, and the economy._ [Take Back the House – Donate $20!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/6725f0aba63daafac3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Take Back the House – Donate $50!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/319aec9728a95d31c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Take Back the House – Donate $100!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/cf49001c2f646d35c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Take Back the House – Donate $500!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/473481b5e9731c67c3d6b838967d376c/35193) His socialist opponent made this seat a close contest in 2018 and wants _AOC’s socialized healthcare and policies of the Green New Deal_. The socialist Democrats are pouring MILLIONS into this seat to try and flip it.

_**[Rush a contribution to Troy Nehls now](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/9de7586675a9d16cc3d6b838967d376c/35193)**_ to keep this seat in Republican hands and send Troy Nehls to Congress to take on the socialist Democrats.

\- Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy [Take Back the House – Donate $20!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/9ddf8e0dbb95321cc3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Take Back the House – Donate $50!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/eb02f103aaf67b4cc3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Take Back the House – Donate $100!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/4d38bff8f1ab095dc3d6b838967d376c/35193) [Take Back the House – Donate $500!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/dcf72e93b3bc61c7c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/cf3b9e91d45761d2c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a04f55354b9d0e05/92b12b48c011b2b8c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

Troy Nehls is just the man to do it in Texas’ 22nd Congressional District. He’s a US Army veteran and law and order Sheriff who’s strong on the military, the border, and the economy. His socialist opponent made this seat a close contest in 2018 and wants AOC’s socialized healthcare and policies of the Green New Deal. The socialist Democrats are pouring MILLIONS into this seat to try and flip it. to keep this seat in Republican hands and send Troy Nehls to Congress to take on the socialist Democrats. \- Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy | | | ---|--- id:2020-10-15-19:51:13:685t Paid for by Nehls for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: ICYMI: Gov. Baker & Gov. Hogan join Gov. Scott
body:
Forum on Leadership, Civility and Unity |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=026cd9fbe4&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Yesterday, **Governor Larry Hogan** of Maryland and **Governor Charlie Baker** of Massachusetts [joined](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8122c34f1e&e=19cebfe173) **Governor Phil Scott** for a [virtual forum on leadership, civility and unity](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ef7c3c59ea&e=19cebfe173).

At a time when our nation feels so divided, the three governors discussed ways we can come together as a nation, put people over politics and deliver real results for Americans.

_"People don’t want political gamesmanship, they just want solutions,"_ Governor Scott said._"The most important thing we can do is treat others with dignity and respect..."

"We desperately need better role models in this country — in our lives. We have to realize our kids are watching and they want to be just like us... We've got to act the same way when nobody's watching as we would on center stage.”_

Governors Baker and Hogan also praised Governor Scott's leadership.

**Governor Hogan:**

_“I really want to make sure Vermonters get out there and do everything they can to get Phil reelected.**He is certainly one of the best governors in the country.** "

“I believe very strongly that, not only does the state of Vermont need Phil Scott to be Governor for another term, but I think America needs to have leaders like Phil Scott...” _

**Governor Baker:**

_"My final thought is that I want to see Phil Scott get reelected on November 3rd. But in addition to that, part of the reason I want to see Phil get reelected is that I like him and I think he is a good man,**But I also believe he does get up every day worrying about what’s in the best interest of Vermont and Vermonters.** And he does work with across the aisle — he’s got a whole career full of that.” _
**[You can watch the full forum by clicking here.](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=aaaab546b6&e=19cebfe173) **
---
|
---

---

name: Leah Stokes
subject: How Jay Inslee's 100% clean electricity plan became Joe Biden's
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Listen in on my conversation with Sam, Bracken, and Sonia.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=3892%2E53494%2Ed-_art) Friend, My friend Katharine Wilkinson and I recently launched a new podcast, **["A Matter of Degrees: Stories for the Climate Curious."](http://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1071?t=3&akid=3892%2E53494%2Ed-_art)** And yesterday, we released a new episode that tells the inside story of where Joe Biden's 2035 target for 100% clean electricity came from: the Inslee campaign! You've probably seen the names of former Inslee staffers Sam Ricketts and Bracken Hendricks in your inbox (they're now on the Evergreen team). Sam and Bracken came on the podcast to tell us how they worked with Governor Inslee to arrive at the 2035 target, a plan that's more ambitious than any state law on the books and one that Biden is now running on. We talk about how technologically feasible it is (very!) and how it could catalyze emissions reductions of 70-80% across the entire economy through electrification. We also talk with Evergreen Advisory Board member Sonia Aggarwal about how transitioning to clean electricity could bring down utility bills. I think you'll be as excited as I was to hear this story. A bold climate agenda is on the ballot this fall. Will you listen in and share these ideas with your friends and family? **[Listen to (and then share!) the podcast to brush up on what's at stake for the climate in this fall's presidential election.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1097?t=4&akid=3892%2E53494%2Ed-_art)** | [SHARE ON TWITTER ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1096?t=5&akid=3892%2E53494%2Ed-_art)
---
[SHARE ON FACEBOOK ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1097?t=6&akid=3892%2E53494%2Ed-_art)
---
Professor Leah Stokes
Author, _**[Short Circuiting Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1072?t=7&akid=3892%2E53494%2Ed-_art)**_
Evergreen Advisory Board Member

subject: Peter, we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGMUR2zExxQTyRYfv9cgPMmNKPXfugWUYefcuIQAuGw=/xFMDeTQdE2IAuUi2K5c6WyatJKbHSNOG54pE6WI_kp0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201023-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Outside special interest groups have spent more than $7 million to defeat our campaign, and we only have 10 days before Election Day to fight back.

**[Republicans are throwing everything they can against Abigail in this stretch until the election.](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGMUR2zExxQTyRYfv9cgPMmNKPXfugWUYefcuIQAuGw=/xFMDeTQdE2IAuUi2K5c6WyatJKbHSNOG54pE6WI_kp0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201023-1-EM&amount=25)**
---
| [FIGHT BACK NOW ](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGMUR2zExxQTyRYfv9cgPMmNKPXfugWUYefcuIQAuGw=/xFMDeTQdE2IAuUi2K5c6WyatJKbHSNOG54pE6WI_kp0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201023-1-EM&amount=25)
---
In the past few years, these super PACs have spent millions of dollars in this district, hoping to diminish Abigail's record of fighting for Central Virginians and buy back this seat. We won't let this happen.

These same groups flooded the district with money in 2018, running attack ads against Abigail. These low, cheap shots didn't work then, and they're not going to work now.

_**[Peter, here 's how you can help:](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGMUR2zExxQTyRYfv9cgPMmNKPXfugWUYefcuIQAuGw=/xFMDeTQdE2IAuUi2K5c6WyatJKbHSNOG54pE6WI_kp0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201023-1-EM&amount=25)**_

**[We need to counter the ongoing spending blitzes from these super PACs.](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGMUR2zExxQTyRYfv9cgPMmNKPXfugWUYefcuIQAuGw=/xFMDeTQdE2IAuUi2K5c6WyatJKbHSNOG54pE6WI_kp0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201023-1-EM&amount=25) **Since Abigail doesn't take corporate PAC money, we rely on grassroots supporters, like yourself, to help us fight back.

_**[Could you contribute to our campaign today to show our opponent's dark, big money backers just how strong our grassroots support is?](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGMUR2zExxQTyRYfv9cgPMmNKPXfugWUYefcuIQAuGw=/xFMDeTQdE2IAuUi2K5c6WyatJKbHSNOG54pE6WI_kp0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201023-1-EM&amount=25)**_
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGMUR2zExxQTyRYfv9cgPMmNKPXfugWUYefcuIQAuGw=/xFMDeTQdE2IAuUi2K5c6WyatJKbHSNOG54pE6WI_kp0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201023-1-EM&amount=25)
---
It's crystal clear: strong leadership in Washington matters. We need politicians like Abigail to continue fighting for their constituents rather than ultra-wealthy corporate backers.

Thank you,

_Bettina
Campaign Manager_

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: rally together
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We're at a critical point in Rhode Island's fight against COVID-19. Yesterday, we identified 449 new cases - a new peak for our state. We all need to work together, right now, to turn this around.
At a time like this, it's easy to focus on the bad. But the truth is, through all of it, I've never been prouder to be a Rhode Islander. The way in which this state has stepped up, lent a hand to one another, and continued to rally together against this virus inspires me every day.
I know we've been asking a lot of you. We're worried about our health, our families, our businesses, our jobs. And on top of that, we're constantly trying to remember to wear our masks, and keep our distance, and check ourselves for symptoms, and do a dozen other things. It's hard, and it's tiring. But this is a team effort. Rhode Islanders are tough. We're resilient. When we get weary, we lift one another up.
We've seen throughout this crisis that Rhode Island is capable of having the best COVID response in America. We have the best testing apparatus in the country. We led the region in reopening our economy. And we led the nation in reopening our schools, with dedicated testing and contact tracing systems and a first-of-its-kind command center.
I believe there's nothing Rhode Islanders can't do. So let's also be number one in mask-wearing. Nearly every state in America has increasing cases right now. Let's be a model for the country on how to turn things around when they're trending in the wrong direction.
We're all part of the same team with the same mission - building Rhode Island's resilience to COVID-19. It's easy to feel strained under the pressure of this pandemic. Even something as small as a text or phone call goes a long way. If we can all lift a little of someone else's burden, we will continue to be resilient as a state.
I want to assure you that there is a light at the end of the tunnel. This isn't going to last forever. So let's stay at it a little bit longer in order to get there as soon as possible.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. body:
Gun violence is a public health crisis. Pat will work to change that. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=e9d4a382df&e=5886ca081d)

| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9580150bbb&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Dear Friend,

Pat knows that gun violence is a health crisis in this nation.

For that reason, she is proud to accept the endorsement of the Newtown Action Alliance — a group dedicated to reversing the escalating gun violence epidemic in this nation through the introduction of smarter, safer gun laws and broader cultural change.

_“Today, NAA is proud to endorse Pat Hackett for the U.S. House of Representatives.

For nearly eight years after a gunman with an AR-15 and high capacity magazines killed 20 children and six educators at the Sandy Hook Elementary School, NAA has been advocating for a set of bold and comprehensive gun control legislative proposals - including the assault weapons ban - to dramatically reduce all forms of gun violence in our nation.

NAA is endorsing ... gun safety candidates who support its top federal policy priority - the assault weapons ban. Candidates who support the assault weapons ban also support a comprehensive package of gun safety policies to end all forms of gun violence in America.”_

The December 14, 2012, shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School where 20 children and six educators were senselessly gunned down is just one of the unthinkable tragedies that has gone unanswered. Just this year there have been over 500 mass shootings and over 1,000 children under the age of 18 killed by gun violence.1

Pat believes that Congress should enact common sense gun laws that continue to protect the rights of responsible gun owners, while preventing tragic and unnecessary deaths.

---
| [SEE THE ENDORSEMENT](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f3437fd8bd&e=5886ca081d "SEE THE ENDORSEMENT")

|
We’re just 11 short days away from Election Day. We need your help to make America a safer place for all.
**When we all chip in a little, we can do a lot. **

subject: Fulton County - vote in person tomorrow!

body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa499/34a064cc/1a1a1a29/7023eb0/1489145046/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Georgia continues to break records in voter turnout as we finish our second week of in-person early voting! National pundits have ranked us the most competitive state in the country, which means your vote matters more than ever. Haven't voted yet? You still have time! Tomorrow, October 24, Saturday early in-person voting will be available in all Georgia counties. That's right, every county has early, in-person voting tomorrow. There has never been a better time to make your voice heard. For those who can't make it to the polls Saturday, early in-person voting will continue through Friday, October 30. Double check your early voting locations and hours at [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa499/34a064cc/1a1a1a29/7023eb1/1489145046/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com") or by calling either 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683) or your county [Board of Elections](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa499/34a064cc/1a1a1a29/7023ebe/1489145046/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do"). If you're voting in Fulton County, we recommend heading to State Farm Arena -- and remember to bring your photo ID with you! Acceptable forms of ID can be found [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa499/34a064cc/1a1a1a29/7023ebf/1489145046/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2"). For more information on how to make your voting plan and ensure your vote is counted, go to [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa499/34a064cc/1a1a1a29/7023ebc/1489145046/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com"). Then, help your friends, neighbors, and family make their plans, too. In order to create the type of change we want to see, we need every eligible voter across Georgia to make their voices heard. Thank you for voting, Team Fair Fight Action |

clean_body: | "" | | Friend - Georgia continues to break records in voter turnout as we finish our second week of in-person early voting! National pundits have ranked us the most competitive state in the country, which means your vote matters more than ever. Haven't voted yet? You still have time! Tomorrow, October 24, Saturday early in-person voting will be available in all Georgia counties. That's right, every county has early, in-person voting tomorrow. There has never been a better time to make your voice heard. For those who can't make it to the polls Saturday, early in-person voting will continue through Friday, October 30. Double check your early voting locations and hours at "" or by calling either 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683) or your county "". If you're voting in Fulton County, we recommend heading to State Farm Arena -- and remember to bring your photo ID with you! Acceptable forms of ID can be found "". For more information on how to make your voting plan and ensure your vote is counted, go to "". Then, help your friends, neighbors, and family make their plans, too. In order to create the type of change we want to see, we need every eligible voter across Georgia to make their voices heard. Thank you for voting, Team Fair Fight Action | ---|---|--- | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2020 Fair Fight Action, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. _“The last time New Mexico had bipartisan representation from its senators was when Domenici and Sen. Jeff Bingaman held the seats. They often disagreed, but they worked together on behalf of their home state. The election of Ronchetti is a chance to bring back that bipartisan team.

And Ronchetti, who exudes energy, comes down on the correct side of a wide range of issues. He fundamentally understands it must be the private sector – not government – that re-energizes the economy and creates wealth as the nation moves through and past the COVID pandemic. He understands we must find ways to live with the virus and mitigate its risks without shutting down the economy.”_

I appreciate the Albuquerque Journal’s kind words, and I look forward to being your next United States Senator,

clean_body: | | | | Peter, The Albuquerque Journal Endorses Mark Ronchetti for US Senate I am proud to announce that I have been endorsed by the Albuquerque Journal to represent New Mexico in the United States Senate! | Here are some excerpts from the Journal’s endorsement of my campaign. “The last time New Mexico had bipartisan representation from its senators was when Domenici and Sen. Jeff Bingaman held the seats. They often disagreed, but they worked together on behalf of their home state. The election of Ronchetti is a chance to bring back that bipartisan team. And Ronchetti, who exudes energy, comes down on the correct side of a wide range of issues. He fundamentally understands it must be the private sector – not government – that re-energizes the economy and creates wealth as the nation moves through and past the COVID pandemic. He understands we must find ways to live with the virus and mitigate its risks without shutting down the economy.” I appreciate the Albuquerque Journal’s kind words, and I look forward to being your next United States Senator, Mark P.S. My campaign has been endorsed by the Albuquerque Journal to represent New Mexico in the United States Senate! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Trump: Sudan to Join UAE, Bahrain in Recognizing Israel; Tech Censorship Is on a Dangerous Path; Why Operation Warp Speed Is a Made-in-America Story.. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=026baaef98&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump: Sudan to Join UAE, Bahrain in Recognizing Israel**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2beec2731&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Associated Press_
“President Donald Trump announced Friday that Sudan will start to normalize ties with Israel, making it the third Arab state to do so as part of U.S.-brokered deals,” Deb Riechmann and Matthew Lee report. “Sudan had demonstrated its commitment in battling terrorism. ‘This is one of the great days in the history of Sudan,’” President Trump said.

**🎬****BREAKING** : [**Israel and Sudan have agreed to make peace!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=83169a7684&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Tech Censorship Is on a Dangerous Path**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=575499fb65&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Daily Signal_
“The titans of social media, [Jack] Dorsey at Twitter and Mark Zuckerberg at Facebook, lead their companies the way China does. These men want to control what the public sees, which enables them to better monitor and, ultimately, influence every aspect of society and life,” Armstrong Williams writes. “It is hard to imagine a more insidious effort to subvert freedom of speech, expression, and the free flow of ideas.”
---
|
---
| [**How Team Trump Is Fighting China’s Ploys to Control the UN**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d13f3ca322&e=3ee4985eea)
_-New York Post_
“I’ve seen firsthand the Chinese Communist Party’s increasingly aggressive efforts to manipulate UN agencies to whitewash its bad behavior, silence criticism and advance authoritarian government,” U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Kelly Craft writes. “Unlike our predecessors, the Trump administration is clear-eyed about this threat.”
---
|
---
| [**Why Operation Warp Speed Is a Made-in-America Story**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7c5bf232f&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“We have already seen tremendous unprecedented progress toward a vaccine. Four of our six vaccine candidates are in the final stage of human trials, and we may even see data emerge from one of more of these in October. In the meantime, a unique made-in-America story is being written,” Health & Human Services Secretary Alex Azar writes.

**📖****MORE:** [**Attacks on U.S. COVID response are ‘unjustified,’ doctor says**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c8599552c3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Confronting Ohio’s Rural Opioid Crisis**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=15268bfb5a&e=3ee4985eea)
-Cleveland.com
“Throughout Ohio and across the country, as we emerge from the COVID-19 pandemic, another health crisis remains: drug addiction . . . President Trump [has] expanded the use of telemedicine, unraveling burdensome regulations to ensure those receiving counseling for substance use disorder are able to receive continuous care,” writes Jim Carroll, director of the White House’s Office of National Drug Control Policy.

**📖****READ:**[**From day one, President Trump waged war on opioid addiction**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fafbc78eb0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05c80b3b7b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=95728ecb17&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=111fe2cff5)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager
subject: Virginians: TODAY is the last day to request your vote by mail ballot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Request your ballot by 5:00 PM
|
---

| | Derek --

If you've been putting off requesting your vote by mail ballot, this is your last chance.

The deadline to request your no-excuse absentee ballot in Virginia is tonight at 5:00 PM ET. Whether you plan to vote by mail or vote in-person, the first step is making a plan. Head over to **[iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0b/53d9897e/557d724e/1c88fe79/2531941932/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/")** to get started.

**I want to give you a little insight into how we 're looking at this deadline as a team.** As of today, over 690,000 vote by mail ballots have been returned, but there are thousands of requested ballots that have yet to be cast. In 2014, Mark's narrow victory was decided by fewer than 17,000 votes -- that's why it's so important that everyone's voice is heard in this election. Those ballots that haven't been returned yet could be the deciding factor for Mark keeping his seat in the Senate this year.

That's why our team is focused on chasing down every last potential voter that has requested a ballot but not yet returned it -- and that means phone calls, text messages, and digital reminders. Making sure that every vote is counted takes time and money, and we're ready to work until the job is done. We could use some help, though!

**[Can you chip in today to ensure we have the funds to reach out to these voters?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0b/53d9897e/557d724e/1c88fe78/2531941932/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-mobilize?refcode=20201023_e_2_fl__895__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

With only 11 days left until Election Day on November 3rd, it's critical that _everyone_ gets the opportunity to have their voices heard. No matter how you're casting your ballot this year, your vote gives you the power to re-elect Mark Warner, flip the Senate blue, and make substantial change in this country.

Thank you for your continued support. We could not do this without you!

-- Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager

P.S. We're so close to the finish line, and we can't do it without you. If you've cast your vote early, THANK YOU! If you're looking for a way to stay involved in the lead-up to Election Day, **[consider a contribution to help us continue our voter turnout efforts in these last few days before the election.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0b/53d9897e/557d724e/1c88fe67/2531941932/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-mobilize?refcode=20201023_e_2_fl__895__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0b/53d9897e/557d724e/1c88fe66/2531941932/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-mobilize?refcode=20201023_e_2_fl__895__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da0b/53d9897e/557d724e/1c88fe65/2531941932/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: UPDATE: New TV Ad + New Endorsement + Early Voting Continues!
body:
I'm excited to share our latest campaign update with you - including our newest TV ad! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/campaign-update-10-23-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=f3cc3f24ae&e=4f010155df)
---
| _**Will Douglas Campaign Update**_
---
| | **📺 New Ad on Broadcast TV! 📺 ** Our values are under attack by those using race to divide us for political power. Racism is real, but violence and defunding the police can't be the answer. Watch our newest tv ad below, titled "Together" -- [https://youtu.be/XrguJn7wLVY](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=afcf591469&e=4f010155df)
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=00ad1f67e9&e=4f010155df)
---
|
---
| **🔥****Endorsed by the Dallas Firefighters Association! ****🚒** I was incredibly proud to be endorsed by the Dallas Firefighters Association this week. I thank all of our local firefighters and fire-based paramedics for their service. Now more than ever, I am committed to strongly supporting our brave first responders and ensuring they get the resources and tools they deserve.
---
|
---
|
---
| **🇺🇸 New yard signs from the Dallas Police Association! 🚓** I was endorsed by the Dallas Police Association earlier this year and they've been such a tremendous help to our campaign, and this week they provided us with a bunch of signs we've been putting up around the district. Swing by our office at 4111 Main Street in Rowlett if you'd like one yourself!

In the legislature, I will always support support our police and back the blue so that we can keep our communities safe.
---
|
---
|
---
| **💊 How We Lower Prescription Drug Prices In Less Than One Minute🏥** The number one issue I'm asked about at the polls is the cost of prescription drugs. As a pharmacist, I know that PBM (pharmacist benefit manager) reform is a key way we can lower prescription drug prices -- and so at the polls, I've been discussing this policy reform with voters. Our campaign turned this into a a brief one-minute explainer video you can watch below... [https://youtu.be/t7qBYbTEK04](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=b69f1a90b6&e=4f010155df)

clean_body: I'm excited to share our latest campaign update with you - including our newest TV ad! | | | | | | Will Douglas Campaign Update | | 📺 New Ad on Broadcast TV! 📺 Our values are under attack by those using race to divide us for political power. Racism is real, but violence and defunding the police can't be the answer. Watch our newest tv ad below, titled "Together" -- | | | 🔥Endorsed by the Dallas Firefighters Association! 🚒 I was incredibly proud to be endorsed by the Dallas Firefighters Association this week. I thank all of our local firefighters and fire-based paramedics for their service. Now more than ever, I am committed to strongly supporting our brave first responders and ensuring they get the resources and tools they deserve. | | | 🇺🇸 New yard signs from the Dallas Police Association! 🚓 I was endorsed by the Dallas Police Association earlier this year and they've been such a tremendous help to our campaign, and this week they provided us with a bunch of signs we've been putting up around the district. Swing by our office at 4111 Main Street in Rowlett if you'd like one yourself! In the legislature, I will always support support our police and back the blue so that we can keep our communities safe. | | | 💊 How We Lower Prescription Drug Prices In Less Than One Minute🏥 The number one issue I'm asked about at the polls is the cost of prescription drugs. As a pharmacist, I know that PBM (pharmacist benefit manager) reform is a key way we can lower prescription drug prices -- and so at the polls, I've been discussing this policy reform with voters. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Can you chip in directly to these Senate candidates?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
There are three Senate races where your support would go a long way to help Democrats win and take back control: Raphael Warnock in Georgia, Steve Bullock in Montana, and John Hickenlooper in Colorado | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6fc/1032541018/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Defeating Donald Trump is powerfully important -- but it won't be enough.

To be able to make real change in January and beyond, we also need to flip the Senate.

That's how we can put this country on track to save our health, save our economy, and create more equality in our nation.

So today, I want to talk about three Senate races where your support would go a long way to help Democrats win and take back control.

**Raphael Warnock in Georgia, Steve Bullock in Montana, and John Hickenlooper in Colorado are running strong campaigns to flip Republican-held Senate seats -- but they're counting on grassroots donors to make the difference in these critical final days.**

**[So I'm asking: If you're able to, will you split a donation of $2 or whatever makes sense between Raphael Warnock, Steve Bullock, John Hickenlooper, and Warren Democrats right now? We need to do everything we can-- to fuel as much grassroots organizing as possible -- before the last votes are cast.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6fe/1032541018/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LWpoLXNiLXJ3IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcxMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDIzX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-jh-sb-rw?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW12F_EGR_END_E_20201023_V1S3_P")**

As a champion for fair wages, Raphael Warnock has been on the frontlines fighting for working families throughout his entire career. At a time when our economy and our government have been rigged to work for the wealthy and well-connected at the expense of everyone else, we need fighters like Raphael in the Senate -- with the courage and conviction to put working families first. The polls in Georgia are tight, and this team can help put Raphael over the top.

Steve Bullock has served Montana as governor and attorney general -- expanding Medicaid for 90,000 people, saving rural hospitals from having to close, protecting access to public lands, and fighting back against the influence of dark money in our politics. He got re-elected as governor in 2016 on the same day Trump won the state by over 20 points -- and now he's neck and neck in this pivotal Senate race.

John Hickenlooper took on the NRA as mayor and then governor. He put in place tough background checks for guns, invested in wind and solar renewable energy to confront the climate crisis, and fought tooth and nail to protect the right to choose. Now, he's ready to defeat Republican Senator Cory Gardner and help Democrats take back the Senate.

**We can flip the Senate and elect Democrats who know that we need bold reform at every level of government. But it's only possible with the support of grassroots donors like you.**

**[Please chip in if you can to help elect Raphael Warnock, Steve Bullock, John Hickenlooper, and Warren Democrats across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6fe/1032541018/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LWpoLXNiLXJ3IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcxMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDIzX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-jh-sb-rw?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW12F_EGR_END_E_20201023_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6fe/1032541018/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LWpoLXNiLXJ3IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcxMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDIzX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-jh-sb-rw?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW12F_EGR_END_E_20201023_V1S3_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6db/1032541018/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6da/1032541018/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6dd/1032541018/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6dc/1032541018/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6df/1032541018/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251f5/45c30650/1c65e9f57/66e8a6de/1032541018/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtney=20Craig?=
subject: Update from the field
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| With a little more than a week to go until Election Day, I want to give you an update on how things are going in the field. We have good news and bad. The good news is, we’re continuing to pick up momentum on the ground; we’re delivering yard signs and getting new volunteers every day, and across the district there’s a lot of energy.

The bad news is that we’re being **swamped** by outside money. Michael Bloomberg has given over a million dollars to flip the Iowa House blue, Theresa Greenfield has brought in over 30 million dollars in the past few months, and JD Scholten continues to see hundreds of thousands of dollars flooding in from Democrat activists across the country.
---
| [Click here to help!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5f1a2addbd&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to help!")
---
| Our team is in the field every single day, travelling across the District doing whatever we can to help Republicans up-and-down the ticket, from county supervisors to US Senators, but we need help to finish strong.

[Can you help keep our team in the field these last 10 days by chipping in $5 or $10](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=ef1c336232&e=d48ad6f8f4)? We’re counting on Iowans to help us cross the finish line, and every contribution goes a long way to helping us reach the undecided voters that can tip the scale!
---
| [Chip in Here!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=bcab875102&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Chip in Here!")
---
| Thank you! Our team appreciates anything you can do to help!

Courtney Craig
_Field Director_
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323
[Add us to your address book](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8)

You can [update your preferences](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4&c=a1b28ed795).

Be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=71bc2382e6&e=d48ad6f8f4), [Twitter](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=c5cef763cb&e=d48ad6f8f4), and [Instagram](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=76b17b322f&e=d48ad6f8f4). Want to get involved with our campaign? Sign up to volunteer [here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=2e9dee6d07&e=d48ad6f8f4).

clean_body: ** FROM THE DESK OF VICE PRESIDENT MIKE PENCE Peter, From Day One of his presidency, and well before, the Democrats and their liberal media allies have schemed and scammed to tear down Donald J. Trump and this administration. Nancy Pelosi and her extreme-left House majority have done all they can to obstruct our America First agenda. They’ve held critical economic relief to American families and businesses hostage to push their radical agenda. They even weaponized impeachment in a scheme to remove President Trump from office! The President and I have had no greater ally than Congresswoman Elise Stefanik. And now, with just weeks until Election Day, she needs our EMERGENCY help. Elise is Nancy Pelosi’s #1 target for defeat, because she stood up and called out the Democrats’ impeachment hoax and she’s LEADING the way to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE! Elise is fighting for our Party’s future and America’s future... she’s fighting for YOU. It’s all hands on deck now in NY-24! I’d consider your support of Elise now a HUGE personal favor. Elise Stefanik is a top rising star in our Party. She proved exactly what she’s made of when she took on Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi during the impeachment fight, and she’s done incredible work to help us deliver RESULTS for the American people. And despite facing her own tough re-election fight in Central New York’s 24th District, Elise has worked tirelessly this year to raise money and provide guidance and support to fight-to-win Republican candidates in top battleground races across the country. She’s laying it all on the line to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE and FIRE NANCY PELOSI... It’s no wonder Elise is the Pelosi campaign machine’s #1 target for defeat! We have just weeks until Election Day. In-person early voting in New York begins on Saturday, October 24th. So please, don’t wait. The Democrats would LOVE to silence this smart, strong, and determined conservative woman and rising Republican star, who’s fighting relentlessly to stop their DISASTROUS extreme-left agenda. ** Sincerely, Mike Pence Vice President of the United States of America - | | | | ---|---|--- Text "Elise" to 33021 to receive text message updates Paid for by Elise for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: The final quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We’re in the final quarter of this campaign season. The clock is down to just 11 days. And the future of Indiana – and the nation – is on the line. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e4e974cce7)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_The Final Quarter_**
We’re in the final quarter of this campaign season. The clock is down to just 11 days. And the future of Indiana – and the nation – is on the line.

I’ve been on the road with **Governor Holcomb** , and everywhere we go, we’re seeing Hoosiers energized about this election. We’ve got players statewide making a big assist – making calls, knocking on doors, and talking with voters. I can’t thank you all enough. And then we’ve got our MVPs, waiting in lines to cast their votes early for the entire Republican team.

Today, **Vice President Mike Pence** joined that team of MVPs, casting his vote early in Indianapolis. And that’s after another excellent rally last night in Fort Wayne ([you can watch the video here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=27a67579fb&e=1acd9bb3d6)). It’s always an honor to welcome **Vice President Pence** home!

This weekend, I challenge each of you to make a difference as the clock ticks down on this election. [Sign up for a shift here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=18b50e1fe8&e=1acd9bb3d6) to volunteer for our Republican candidates. [Find your polling place and times](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1d7c8f87db&e=1acd9bb3d6), and go cast your ballot early. You’ve got the ball – now’s the time to make a play.

-Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO:** _**Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer** was on the road with **Governor Holcomb** today. And, of course when you're in Upland, you stop at Ivanhoe's for some ice cream! G**rant County GOP Chairman Darren Reese** also stopped by!_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana for All_** It's been another busy week for **Governor Holcomb**! He joined executives of Advanced Accelerator Applications to break ground on the company's new Indianapolis facility and participated in Indiana's first [gubernatorial debate](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d3c18d7723&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Advanced Accelerator Applications, a pharmaceutical group specializing in the field of nuclear medicine, broke ground on the company's new, $72 million, 60,000-square-foot Indianapolis facility that's bringing new jobs to Indiana. The new facility will significantly expand the company's manufacturing capacity in the U.S. and will feature state-of-the-art, advanced manufacturing technologies. Under **Governor Holcomb's** leadership, Indiana is continuing to lead the way when it comes to manufacturing critical medical devices!

**Governor Holcomb** also participated in Indiana's first [gubernatorial debate](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e3395307e2&e=1acd9bb3d6) where he clearly outlined his plan for the next four years as he continues building One Indiana for All. He spoke at length about recovering from the pandemic, dropping our infant mortality rate to an all-time low, increasing adoptions, building a record-breaking economy, and bringing huge numbers of jobs to our state. We’re facing a crucial choice in less than two weeks, and it’s never been more important to stay on top of the key issues. If you missed the [debate](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=edcabe20a5&e=1acd9bb3d6) watch a replay [here](). _**"I want to thank every Hoosier watching tonight, as it’s they who helped create such positive, forward momentum over the last four years.” - Governor Eric Holcomb**_ To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=61bcc8d677&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6f59454170&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=222858bed9&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Early Voting: Go Vote Now!_** Early voting is now available statewide, with thousands of Hoosiers already going to the polls to make their voice heard. Our Republican team up and down the ballot needs your vote, so consider getting out this weekend or next week to cast your ballot. **Find your local early vote locations and hours:
[2020 Election Information Center](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=98d38e9198&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=40c6b9c95b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Volunteer Today: Full Court Press**_ As Chairman Hupfer said in his note above, it’s the fourth quarter, and it’s time for a full court press in this election!

Let’s make sure **Governor Holcomb** and our entire Republican team win this election – and we do that by making sure our entire team is on the court. You can make a difference right now by talking to Hoosier votes – making calls and canvassing your neighborhood. **[Sign up for a shift now here!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1f64ea104d&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e303a9d6b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Next Week: Final Gubernatorial Debate**_ With just days until Election Day, the second and final gubernatorial debate is scheduled for next Tuesday, Oct. 27 at 7 p.m.

[Check back here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=47d98e432f&e=1acd9bb3d6) for a livestream and other places to watch live. Make sure to tune in, and support Governor Holcomb as he works to continue building One Indiana for All!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b59db2b17f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Big News: Indiana Moves Up in State Tax Climate Ranking**_ The Tax Foundation, an independent tax policy research organization, updated its [State Business Tax Climate Index for 2021](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e1ef036d17&e=1acd9bb3d6). The new rankings have Indiana maintaining its status as the best tax climate in the Midwest. Indiana also moved up in overall ranking to the ninth-best business tax climate in the nation. _“Governor Holcomb and our Republican General Assembly have cut taxes and kept Hoosiers’ overall tax burden low. That why, even during this pandemic, Indiana continues to be a magnet for job creators and investment. Under Governor Holcomb’s steady leadership, Indiana is balancing lives and livelihoods, making our state an even more attractive state for business,”_
-Kyle Hupfer, chairman of the Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| _**Todd Rokita on the Road**_
Indiana’s next attorney general,**Todd Rokita** , has been busy on the road this week talking with Hoosiers across the state.

That’s included attending a Right to Life banquet in Daviess County, talking with Hoosiers before they voted in West Lafayette, attending a Back the Blue rally in Plainfield, and catching up with more Republican friends at a rally in Boone County.

Check out some of the photos above, and even more photos by [following Todd Rokita on Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e9cba3b4b4&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| **_Upcoming Events_**
[October 24](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=88129a81af&e=1acd9bb3d6): Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 26](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b72e4b7fd8&e=1acd9bb3d6): Jackson County Lincoln Day Dinner
[November 22](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e93b546b0a&e=1acd9bb3d6): IFRW Women's Suffrage Centennial Tea Celebration
_Have an event to add? Please email it to [info@indiana.gop](mailto:info@indiana.gop)!_
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[won the first gubernatorial debate](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a7e5abcccc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[presents checks for broadband expansion in Henry County](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6454b0b54d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young**[s](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=140a4b5cf6&e=1acd9bb3d6)[upports Victoria Spartz for Congress](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b51ecbaff6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun**[paid respects to fallen military hero](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2d1e66ab44&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[ _announces legislation to improve school bus traffic safety_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a5bfa9768a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks**[earns the Guardian of Small Business from NFIB](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5fa4ef0965&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird**[awarded the Friend of Farm Bureau Award](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=90250b86f5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks **[encourages applications for 2020 Congressional App Challenge](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=abfe4bc7a6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence**[recognizes Greenfield Police Officer Crull for serving his community](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48d2d8a51e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[attends Sullivan County Lincoln Day with Governor Holcomb](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=63251c5d01&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth** _[is door knocking to m](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=69de0d03e0&e=1acd9bb3d6)_[ _ake sure your voice is heard_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f834c02cbc&e=1acd9bb3d6)

subject: 234 donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
This election will come down to the very last donation. | [](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=7349906a23634444b03c6c0846640c26&_e=o_DBSVuLjJKKHyRVATIbqqLiUIFHiah7WgiBx2r1XCw9H1faOyTn6i5UFzg31UrMMPLKyreS5I4O4IHA7CW4ym97vH8T8sUjinyEypil6iJ68B96RcwtJTRfOkpdba09UcWvtzhdA68Vukfv3ul56CHFwXr1JPynmI5sXcjoUdjRp4yAKTHmhy-oSUnJDinTuQCjhtZccAH8n0yeXUmc4OM0pRbVUW3Mj04GjQBr8Z-ehXY8HZdMTtil1E5dRbaDRzznJqUmKXoHOyjZSSw2k_5XpeYyxI_x6jtoYorO25eNDnuXZYF4ODHgauua3XYKFejje57r4M6RSDabC1R6PWuJcE6u-lnrP0OSnl6ao_JSDD5n11M9L97g77el8IzU7XcaeuGLqtdIQj9MtLjnlw%3D%3D)

Friend, Are you ready to vote? Tomorrow marks the start of early voting for NY27. This will be a massive election, and there will be long lines for the polls on election day - beat the lines and vote safely in person with early voting. We've made it easy for you to find your early voting location: [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/UYW2494aLGBR7Y39zxasaQ/8920QBKY0SeM1hFqfMR892XA9Q) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/UYW2494aLGBR7Y39zxasaQ/8920QBKY0SeM1hFqfMR892XA9Q) This election will decide the future of the nation and our region. Congressman Jacobs is fighting to rebuild our economy, bring new opportunities and good-paying jobs to NY27, support our farmers, and defend our police and public safety.
